---
title: "Untitled"
author: "binta saji john"
date: "2026-05-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

##data
```{r}
load("C:/Users/BINTA SAJI JOHN/Desktop/project_primary/linnet.rda")
data("linnet")
datak=linnet
mean(linnet$eggs)
var(linnet$eggs)
head(linnet)

plot(table(linnet$eggs))
```



#train&test

```{r}
set.seed(123)

traina = sample(1:nrow(datak), 0.7 * nrow(datak))
train_1 = datak[traina,]
test_1 = datak[-traina,]

trainb = sample(1:nrow(datak), 0.80 * nrow(datak))
train_2 = datak[trainb,]
test_2 = datak[-trainb,]

trainc = sample(1:nrow(datak), 0.90 * nrow(datak))
train_3 = datak[trainc,]
test_3 = datak[-trainc,]

length(traina)

actual1=test_1$eggs
actual2=test_1$eggs
actual3=test_1$eggs

```


#POISSON-MODEL
```{r}
#========================================================
# POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_poi1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("POISSON1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_1[] <- lapply(

  train_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_1[] <- lapply(

  test_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_1[
    sapply(
      train_1,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_1[[v]] <- factor(

    train_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_1[[v]] <- factor(

    test_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT POISSON MODEL
#====================================================

poi_model1 <- glm(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_1,

  family = poisson
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_poi <- predict(

  poi_model1,

  newdata = test_1,

  type = "response"
)

pre1_poi <- as.numeric(
  pre1_poi
)

pre1_poi <- pmax(
  0,
  pre1_poi
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual1
) & is.finite(
  pre1_poi
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_poi <- pre1_poi[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL PI
#====================================================

resid1 <- abs(
  actual1 - pre1_poi
)

qhat1 <- quantile(
  resid1,
  0.95,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_conf1 <- pre1_poi - qhat1

upper_conf1 <- pre1_poi + qhat1

lower_conf1 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_conf1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_conf1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_conf1 &

    actual1 <= upper_conf1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_conf1 <- mean(

  upper_conf1 -

    lower_conf1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_poi1 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual1 -

        pre1_poi
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_poi1 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual1 -

      pre1_poi
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_poi1 <- mean(

  actual1 -

    pre1_poi
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_poi1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_poi1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_poi1,

    MAE = MAE_poi1,

    Coverage = coverage_conf1,

    Width = width_conf1,

    ME = ME_poi1
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_poi1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_poi1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_poi1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_poi1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_poi1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_poi1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_poi1
```
#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 79:21 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_poi2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("POISSON2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.80 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_2[] <- lapply(

  train_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_2[] <- lapply(

  test_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_2[
    sapply(
      train_2,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_2[[v]] <- factor(

    train_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_2[[v]] <- factor(

    test_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT POISSON MODEL
#====================================================

poi_model2 <- glm(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_2,

  family = poisson
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_poi <- predict(

  poi_model2,

  newdata = test_2,

  type = "response"
)

pre2_poi <- as.numeric(
  pre2_poi
)

pre2_poi <- pmax(
  0,
  pre2_poi
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual2
) & is.finite(
  pre2_poi
)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index
]

pre2_poi <- pre2_poi[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL PI
#====================================================

resid2 <- abs(
  actual2 - pre2_poi
)

qhat2 <- quantile(
  resid2,
  0.95,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_conf2 <- pre2_poi - qhat2

upper_conf2 <- pre2_poi + qhat2

lower_conf2 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_conf2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_conf2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_conf2 &

    actual2 <= upper_conf2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_conf2 <- mean(

  upper_conf2 -

    lower_conf2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_poi2 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual2 -

        pre2_poi
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_poi2 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual2 -

      pre2_poi
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_poi2 <- mean(

  actual2 -

    pre2_poi
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_poi2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_poi2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_poi2,

    MAE = MAE_poi2,

    Coverage = coverage_conf2,

    Width = width_conf2,

    ME = ME_poi2
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_poi2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_poi2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_poi2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_poi2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_poi2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_poi2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_poi2
```
#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 88:12 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_poi3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("POISSON3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.90 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_3[] <- lapply(

  train_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_3[] <- lapply(

  test_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_3[
    sapply(
      train_3,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_3[[v]] <- factor(

    train_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_3[[v]] <- factor(

    test_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT POISSON MODEL
#====================================================

poi_model3 <- glm(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_3,

  family = poisson
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_poi <- predict(

  poi_model3,

  newdata = test_3,

  type = "response"
)

pre3_poi <- as.numeric(
  pre3_poi
)

pre3_poi <- pmax(
  0,
  pre3_poi
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual3
) & is.finite(
  pre3_poi
)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index
]

pre3_poi <- pre3_poi[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL PI
#====================================================

resid3 <- abs(
  actual3 - pre3_poi
)

qhat3 <- quantile(
  resid3,
  0.95,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_conf3 <- pre3_poi - qhat3

upper_conf3 <- pre3_poi + qhat3

lower_conf3 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_conf3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_conf3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_conf3 &

    actual3 <= upper_conf3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_conf3 <- mean(

  upper_conf3 -

    lower_conf3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_poi3 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual3 -

        pre3_poi
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_poi3 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual3 -

      pre3_poi
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_poi3 <- mean(

  actual3 -

    pre3_poi
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_poi3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_poi3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_poi3,

    MAE = MAE_poi3,

    Coverage = coverage_conf3,

    Width = width_conf3,

    ME = ME_poi3
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_poi3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_poi3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_poi3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_poi3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_poi3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_poi3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_poi3
```
#QUASI-POISSON
```{r}
#========================================================
# QUASI-POISSON MODEL
# LINNET DATA
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_quasi1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("QUASI-POISSON : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  traina <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.70*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_1 <- datak[traina, ]

  test_1 <- datak[-traina, ]

  actual1 <- test_1$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_quasi1 <- glm(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = quasipoisson(link = "log"),

    data = train_1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_quasi1 <- predict(

    model_quasi1,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_quasi1 <- as.numeric(pred_quasi1)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_quasi1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_quasi1 <- pred_quasi1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_quasi1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_quasi1,

    actual1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #------------------------------------------------------

  phi_quasi1 <- summary(
    model_quasi1
  )$dispersion

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_quasi1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_quasi1),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  for(j in 1:length(pred_quasi1)){

    mu_j <- pred_quasi1[j]

    theta_j <- max(
      mu_j/(phi_quasi1 - 1),
      0.001
    )

    sim_quasi1[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_j,

      size = theta_j
    )
  }

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  lower_quasi1 <- apply(

    sim_quasi1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_quasi1 <- apply(

    sim_quasi1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  lower_quasi1 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_quasi1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_quasi1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_quasi1 &

      actual1 <= upper_quasi1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_quasi1 <- mean(

    upper_quasi1 -

      lower_quasi1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_quasi1 <- rbind(

    results_quasi1,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      ME = acc_quasi1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_quasi1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_quasi1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_quasi1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_quasi1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_quasi1,

      Width = width_quasi1
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =", coverage_quasi1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =", width_quasi1,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_quasi1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Quasi-Poisson",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_quasi1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_quasi1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_quasi1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_quasi1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_quasi1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_quasi1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_quasi1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_quasi1
```
#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# QUASI-POISSON MODEL
# LINNET DATA
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_quasi2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("QUASI-POISSON : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  trainb <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.80*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_2 <- datak[trainb, ]

  test_2 <- datak[-trainb, ]

  actual2 <- test_2$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_quasi2 <- glm(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = quasipoisson(link = "log"),

    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_quasi2 <- predict(

    model_quasi2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_quasi2 <- as.numeric(pred_quasi2)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_quasi2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_quasi2 <- pred_quasi2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_quasi2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_quasi2,

    actual2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #------------------------------------------------------

  phi_quasi2 <- summary(
    model_quasi2
  )$dispersion

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_quasi2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_quasi2),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  for(j in 1:length(pred_quasi2)){

    mu_j <- pred_quasi2[j]

    theta_j <- max(
      mu_j/(phi_quasi2 - 1),
      0.001
    )

    sim_quasi2[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_j,

      size = theta_j
    )
  }

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  lower_quasi2 <- apply(

    sim_quasi2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_quasi2 <- apply(

    sim_quasi2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  lower_quasi2 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_quasi2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_quasi2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_quasi2 &

    actual2 <= upper_quasi2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_quasi2 <- mean(

    upper_quasi2 -

    lower_quasi2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_quasi2 <- rbind(

    results_quasi2,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      ME = acc_quasi2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_quasi2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_quasi2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_quasi2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_quasi2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_quasi2,

      Width = width_quasi2
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_quasi2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_quasi2,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_quasi2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Quasi-Poisson",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_quasi2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_quasi2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_quasi2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_quasi2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_quasi2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_quasi2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_quasi2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_quasi2
```
#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# QUASI-POISSON MODEL
# LINNET DATA
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_quasi3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("QUASI-POISSON : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  trainc <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.90*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_3 <- datak[trainc, ]

  test_3 <- datak[-trainc, ]

  actual3 <- test_3$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_quasi3 <- glm(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = quasipoisson(link = "log"),

    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_quasi3 <- predict(

    model_quasi3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_quasi3 <- as.numeric(pred_quasi3)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_quasi3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_quasi3 <- pred_quasi3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_quasi3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_quasi3,

    actual3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #------------------------------------------------------

  phi_quasi3 <- summary(
    model_quasi3
  )$dispersion

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_quasi3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_quasi3),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  for(j in 1:length(pred_quasi3)){

    mu_j <- pred_quasi3[j]

    theta_j <- max(
      mu_j/(phi_quasi3 - 1),
      0.001
    )

    sim_quasi3[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_j,

      size = theta_j
    )
  }

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  lower_quasi3 <- apply(

    sim_quasi3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_quasi3 <- apply(

    sim_quasi3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  lower_quasi3 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_quasi3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_quasi3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_quasi3 &

    actual3 <= upper_quasi3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_quasi3 <- mean(

    upper_quasi3 -

    lower_quasi3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_quasi3 <- rbind(

    results_quasi3,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      ME = acc_quasi3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_quasi3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_quasi3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_quasi3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_quasi3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_quasi3,

      Width = width_quasi3
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_quasi3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_quasi3,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_quasi3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Quasi-Poisson",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_quasi3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_quasi3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_quasi3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_quasi3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_quasi3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_quasi3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_quasi3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_quasi3
```

##NB
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALIZED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# glm.nb()
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(MASS)

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nb1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("NB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_1[] <- lapply(

  train_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_1[] <- lapply(

  test_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_1[
    sapply(
      train_1,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_1[[v]] <- factor(

    train_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_1[[v]] <- factor(

    test_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT NB MODEL
#====================================================

train1_nb <- glm.nb(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_nb <- predict(

  train1_nb,

  newdata = test_1,

  type = "response"
)

pre1_nb <- as.numeric(
  pre1_nb
)

pre1_nb <- pmax(
  0,
  pre1_nb
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual1
) & is.finite(
  pre1_nb
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_nb <- pre1_nb[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL PI
#====================================================

resid_nb1 <- abs(
  actual1 - pre1_nb
)

qhat_nb1 <- quantile(
  resid_nb1,
  0.95,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_conf_nb1 <- pre1_nb - qhat_nb1

upper_conf_nb1 <- pre1_nb + qhat_nb1

lower_conf_nb1 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_conf_nb1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_conf_nb1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_conf_nb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_conf_nb1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_conf_nb1 <- mean(

  upper_conf_nb1 -

    lower_conf_nb1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_nb1 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual1 -

        pre1_nb
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_nb1 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual1 -

      pre1_nb
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_nb1 <- mean(

  actual1 -

    pre1_nb
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_nb1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_nb1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_nb1,

    MAE = MAE_nb1,

    Coverage = coverage_conf_nb1,

    Width = width_conf_nb1,

    ME = ME_nb1
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_nb1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_nb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_nb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_nb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_nb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_nb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_nb1
```

#80

```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALIZED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# glm.nb()
# CONFORMAL PI
# 79:21 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#=======================================================

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nb2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("NB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.79 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_2[] <- lapply(

  train_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_2[] <- lapply(

  test_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_2[
    sapply(
      train_2,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_2[[v]] <- factor(

    train_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_2[[v]] <- factor(

    test_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT NB MODEL
#====================================================

train2_nb <- glm.nb(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_2
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_nb <- predict(

  train2_nb,

  newdata = test_2,

  type = "response"
)

pre2_nb <- as.numeric(
  pre2_nb
)

pre2_nb <- pmax(
  0,
  pre2_nb
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual2
) & is.finite(
  pre2_nb
)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index
]

pre2_nb <- pre2_nb[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL PI
#====================================================

resid_nb2 <- abs(
  actual2 - pre2_nb
)

qhat_nb2 <- quantile(
  resid_nb2,
  0.95,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_conf_nb2 <- pre2_nb - qhat_nb2

upper_conf_nb2 <- pre2_nb + qhat_nb2

lower_conf_nb2 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_conf_nb2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_conf_nb2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_conf_nb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_conf_nb2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_conf_nb2 <- mean(

  upper_conf_nb2 -

    lower_conf_nb2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_nb2 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual2 -

        pre2_nb
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_nb2 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual2 -

      pre2_nb
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_nb2 <- mean(

  actual2 -

    pre2_nb
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_nb2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_nb2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_nb2,

    MAE = MAE_nb2,

    Coverage = coverage_conf_nb2,

    Width = width_conf_nb2,

    ME = ME_nb2
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_nb2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_nb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_nb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_nb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_nb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_nb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_nb2
```


#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALIZED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# glm.nb()
# CONFORMAL PI
# 88:12 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nb3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("NB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.88 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_3[] <- lapply(

  train_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_3[] <- lapply(

  test_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_3[
    sapply(
      train_3,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_3[[v]] <- factor(

    train_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_3[[v]] <- factor(

    test_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT NB MODEL
#====================================================

train3_nb <- glm.nb(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_3
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_nb <- predict(

  train3_nb,

  newdata = test_3,

  type = "response"
)

pre3_nb <- as.numeric(
  pre3_nb
)

pre3_nb <- pmax(
  0,
  pre3_nb
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual3
) & is.finite(
  pre3_nb
)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index
]

pre3_nb <- pre3_nb[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL PI
#====================================================

resid_nb3 <- abs(
  actual3 - pre3_nb
)

qhat_nb3 <- quantile(
  resid_nb3,
  0.95,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_conf_nb3 <- pre3_nb - qhat_nb3

upper_conf_nb3 <- pre3_nb + qhat_nb3

lower_conf_nb3 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_conf_nb3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_conf_nb3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_conf_nb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_conf_nb3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_conf_nb3 <- mean(

  upper_conf_nb3 -

    lower_conf_nb3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_nb3 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual3 -

        pre3_nb
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_nb3 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual3 -

      pre3_nb
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_nb3 <- mean(

  actual3 -

    pre3_nb
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_nb3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_nb3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_nb3,

    MAE = MAE_nb3,

    Coverage = coverage_conf_nb3,

    Width = width_conf_nb3,

    ME = ME_nb3
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_nb3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_nb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_nb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_nb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_nb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_nb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_nb3
```

##COMPOISSON
```{r}
#========================================================
# CONWAY-MAXWELL POISSON MODEL
# glm.cmp()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(COMPoissonReg)

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_cmp1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("CMP1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_1[] <- lapply(

  train_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_1[] <- lapply(

  test_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_1[
    sapply(
      train_1,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_1[[v]] <- factor(

    train_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_1[[v]] <- factor(

    test_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT CMP MODEL
#====================================================

train1_cmp <- glm.cmp(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_compoi <- predict(

  train1_cmp,

  newdata = test_1,

  type = "response"
)

pre1_compoi <- as.numeric(
  pre1_compoi
)

pre1_compoi <- pmax(
  0,
  pre1_compoi
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual1
) & is.finite(
  pre1_compoi
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_compoi <- pre1_compoi[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_cmp1 <- actual1 - pre1_compoi

#====================================================
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid1 <- quantile(

  resid_cmp1,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid1 <- quantile(

  resid_cmp1,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_cmp1 <- pre1_compoi +

  lower_resid1

upper_cmp1 <- pre1_compoi +

  upper_resid1

#====================================================
# COUNT DATA SAFETY
#====================================================

lower_cmp1 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_cmp1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_cmp1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_cmp1 &

    actual1 <= upper_cmp1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_cmp1 <- mean(

  upper_cmp1 -

    lower_cmp1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_cmp1 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual1 -

        pre1_compoi
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_cmp1 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual1 -

      pre1_compoi
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_cmp1 <- mean(

  actual1 -

    pre1_compoi
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_cmp1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_cmp1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_cmp1,

    MAE = MAE_cmp1,

    Coverage = coverage_cmp1,

    Width = width_cmp1,

    ME = ME_cmp1
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_cmp1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_cmp1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_cmp1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_cmp1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_cmp1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_cmp1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_cmp1
```


#80


```{r}
#========================================================
# CONWAY-MAXWELL POISSON MODEL
# glm.cmp()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 79:21 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(COMPoissonReg)

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_cmp2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("CMP2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.79 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_2[] <- lapply(

  train_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_2[] <- lapply(

  test_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_2[
    sapply(
      train_2,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_2[[v]] <- factor(

    train_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_2[[v]] <- factor(

    test_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT CMP MODEL
#====================================================

train2_cmp <- glm.cmp(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_2
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_compoi <- predict(

  train2_cmp,

  newdata = test_2,

  type = "response"
)

pre2_compoi <- as.numeric(
  pre2_compoi
)

pre2_compoi <- pmax(
  0,
  pre2_compoi
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual2
) & is.finite(
  pre2_compoi
)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index
]

pre2_compoi <- pre2_compoi[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_cmp2 <- actual2 - pre2_compoi

#====================================================
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid2 <- quantile(

  resid_cmp2,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid2 <- quantile(

  resid_cmp2,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_cmp2 <- pre2_compoi +

  lower_resid2

upper_cmp2 <- pre2_compoi +

  upper_resid2

#====================================================
# COUNT DATA SAFETY
#====================================================

lower_cmp2 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_cmp2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_cmp2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_cmp2 &

    actual2 <= upper_cmp2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_cmp2 <- mean(

  upper_cmp2 -

    lower_cmp2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_cmp2 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual2 -

        pre2_compoi
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_cmp2 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual2 -

      pre2_compoi
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_cmp2 <- mean(

  actual2 -

    pre2_compoi
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_cmp2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_cmp2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_cmp2,

    MAE = MAE_cmp2,

    Coverage = coverage_cmp2,

    Width = width_cmp2,

    ME = ME_cmp2
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_cmp2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_cmp2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_cmp2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_cmp2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_cmp2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_cmp2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_cmp2
```


```{r}
#========================================================
# CONWAY-MAXWELL POISSON MODEL
# glm.cmp()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 88:12 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(COMPoissonReg)

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_cmp3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("CMP3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.88 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_3[] <- lapply(

  train_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_3[] <- lapply(

  test_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_3[
    sapply(
      train_3,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_3[[v]] <- factor(

    train_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_3[[v]] <- factor(

    test_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT CMP MODEL
#====================================================

train3_cmp <- glm.cmp(

  eggs ~ .,

  data = train_3
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_compoi <- predict(

  train3_cmp,

  newdata = test_3,

  type = "response"
)

pre3_compoi <- as.numeric(
  pre3_compoi
)

pre3_compoi <- pmax(
  0,
  pre3_compoi
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual3
) & is.finite(
  pre3_compoi
)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index
]

pre3_compoi <- pre3_compoi[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_cmp3 <- actual3 - pre3_compoi

#====================================================
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid3 <- quantile(

  resid_cmp3,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid3 <- quantile(

  resid_cmp3,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_cmp3 <- pre3_compoi +

  lower_resid3

upper_cmp3 <- pre3_compoi +

  upper_resid3

#====================================================
# COUNT DATA SAFETY
#====================================================

lower_cmp3 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_cmp3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_cmp3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_cmp3 &

    actual3 <= upper_cmp3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_cmp3 <- mean(

  upper_cmp3 -

    lower_cmp3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_cmp3 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual3 -

        pre3_compoi
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_cmp3 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual3 -

      pre3_compoi
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_cmp3 <- mean(

  actual3 -

    pre3_compoi
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_cmp3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_cmp3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_cmp3,

    MAE = MAE_cmp3,

    Coverage = coverage_cmp3,

    Width = width_cmp3,

    ME = ME_cmp3
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_cmp3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_cmp3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_cmp3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_cmp3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_cmp3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_cmp3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_cmp3
```
#GENERALISED NB
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALISED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# GAMLSS - NBI()
# LINNET DATA
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(gamlss)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_gnb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GNB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  traina <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.70*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_1 <- datak[traina, ]

  test_1 <- datak[-traina, ]

  actual1 <- test_1$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_gnb1 <- gamlss(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = NBI(),

    data = train_1,

    trace = FALSE
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_gnb1 <- predict(

    model_gnb1,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_gnb1 <- as.numeric(pred_gnb1)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_gnb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_gnb1 <- pred_gnb1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_gnb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gnb1,

    actual1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nsim <- 1000

  sigma_gnb1 <- exp(

    predict(

      model_gnb1,

      newdata = test_1,

      what = "sigma",

      type = "link"
    )
  )

  sigma_gnb1 <- sigma_gnb1[keep]

  sim_gnb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gnb1),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gnb1)){

    sim_gnb1[j, ] <- rNBII(

      nsim,

      mu = pred_gnb1[j],

      sigma = sigma_gnb1[j]
    )
  }

  lower_gnb1 <- apply(

    sim_gnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_gnb1 <- apply(

    sim_gnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  lower_gnb1 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_gnb1)
  )

  upper_gnb1 <- round(
    upper_gnb1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_gnb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_gnb1 &

      actual1 <= upper_gnb1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_gnb1 <- mean(

    upper_gnb1 -

      lower_gnb1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_gnb1 <- rbind(

    results_gnb1,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      ME = acc_gnb1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gnb1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gnb1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gnb1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gnb1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gnb1,

      Width = width_gnb1
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_gnb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_gnb1,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_gnb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Generalized NB",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb1
```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALISED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# GAMLSS - NBI()
# LINNET DATA
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(gamlss)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_gnb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GNB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  trainb <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.80*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_2 <- datak[trainb, ]

  test_2 <- datak[-trainb, ]

  actual2 <- test_2$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_gnb2 <- gamlss(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = NBI(),

    data = train_2,

    trace = FALSE
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_gnb2 <- predict(

    model_gnb2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_gnb2 <- as.numeric(pred_gnb2)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_gnb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_gnb2 <- pred_gnb2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_gnb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gnb2,

    actual2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICT SIGMA
  #------------------------------------------------------

  sigma_gnb2 <- exp(

    predict(

      model_gnb2,

      newdata = test_2,

      what = "sigma",

      type = "link"
    )
  )

  sigma_gnb2 <- sigma_gnb2[keep]

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SIMULATION PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gnb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gnb2),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gnb2)){

    sim_gnb2[j, ] <- rNBII(

      nsim,

      mu = pred_gnb2[j],

      sigma = sigma_gnb2[j]
    )
  }

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  lower_gnb2 <- apply(

    sim_gnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_gnb2 <- apply(

    sim_gnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  lower_gnb2 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_gnb2)
  )

  upper_gnb2 <- round(
    upper_gnb2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_gnb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_gnb2 &
```
