```{r}
      actual2 <= upper_gnb2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_gnb2 <- mean(

    upper_gnb2 -

      lower_gnb2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  split_gnb2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_gnb2,

    Lower_PI = lower_gnb2,

    Upper_PI = upper_gnb2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "GNB2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gnb2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_gnb2 <- rbind(

    results_gnb2,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      ME = acc_gnb2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gnb2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gnb2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gnb2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gnb2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gnb2,

      Width = width_gnb2
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_gnb2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_gnb2,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_gnb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Generalized NB",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALISED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# GAMLSS - NBI()
# LINNET DATA
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(gamlss)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_gnb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GNB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  trainc <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.90*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_3 <- datak[trainc, ]

  test_3 <- datak[-trainc, ]

  actual3 <- test_3$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_gnb3 <- gamlss(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = NBI(),

    data = train_3,

    trace = FALSE
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_gnb3 <- predict(

    model_gnb3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_gnb3 <- as.numeric(pred_gnb3)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_gnb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_gnb3 <- pred_gnb3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_gnb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gnb3,

    actual3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICT SIGMA
  #------------------------------------------------------

  sigma_gnb3 <- exp(

    predict(

      model_gnb3,

      newdata = test_3,

      what = "sigma",

      type = "link"
    )
  )

  sigma_gnb3 <- sigma_gnb3[keep]

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SIMULATION PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gnb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gnb3),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gnb3)){

    sim_gnb3[j, ] <- rNBII(

      nsim,

      mu = pred_gnb3[j],

      sigma = sigma_gnb3[j]
    )
  }

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  lower_gnb3 <- apply(

    sim_gnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_gnb3 <- apply(

    sim_gnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  lower_gnb3 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_gnb3)
  )

  upper_gnb3 <- round(
    upper_gnb3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_gnb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_gnb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_gnb3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_gnb3 <- mean(

    upper_gnb3 -

    lower_gnb3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  split_gnb3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_gnb3,

    Lower_PI = lower_gnb3,

    Upper_PI = upper_gnb3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "GNB3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gnb3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_gnb3 <- rbind(

    results_gnb3,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      ME = acc_gnb3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gnb3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gnb3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gnb3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gnb3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gnb3,

      Width = width_gnb3
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_gnb3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_gnb3,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_gnb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Generalized NB",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb3
```



#GENERALISED-POISSON
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALISED POISSON MODEL
# LINNET DATA
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(VGAM)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_gp1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GENERALIZED POISSON : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  traina <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.70*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_1 <- datak[traina, ]

  test_1 <- datak[-traina, ]

  actual1 <- test_1$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_gp1 <- vglm(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = genpoisson0(),

    data = train_1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # AIC AND BIC
  #------------------------------------------------------

  aic_gp1 <- AIC(model_gp1)

  bic_gp1 <- BIC(model_gp1)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_gp1 <- predict(

    model_gp1,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_gp1 <- as.numeric(pred_gp1)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_gp1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_gp1 <- pred_gp1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_gp1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gp1,

    actual1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SAFE MAPE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nonzero <- actual1 != 0

  MAPE_gp1 <- mean(

    abs(

      (actual1[nonzero] -

       pred_gp1[nonzero]) /

       actual1[nonzero]

    ),

    na.rm = TRUE

  ) * 100

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  residuals_gp1 <- actual1 - pred_gp1

  lower_resid <- quantile(
    residuals_gp1,
    0.025,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  upper_resid <- quantile(
    residuals_gp1,
    0.975,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_gp1 <- pred_gp1 + lower_resid

  upper_gp1 <- pred_gp1 + upper_resid

  lower_gp1 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_gp1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_gp1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_gp1 &

      actual1 <= upper_gp1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_gp1 <- mean(

    upper_gp1 -

      lower_gp1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  split_gp1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_gp1,

    Lower_PI = lower_gp1,

    Upper_PI = upper_gp1
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GP1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),
    split_gp1
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_gp1 <- rbind(

    results_gp1,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      AIC = aic_gp1,

      BIC = bic_gp1,

      ME = acc_gp1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gp1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gp1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gp1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = MAPE_gp1,

      Coverage = coverage_gp1,

      Width = width_gp1
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_gp1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_gp1,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_gp1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Generalized Poisson",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_gp1$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_gp1$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gp1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gp1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gp1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gp1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gp1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gp1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gp1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gp1
```


#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALISED POISSON MODEL
# LINNET DATA
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(VGAM)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_gp2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GENERALIZED POISSON : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  trainb <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.80*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_2 <- datak[trainb, ]

  test_2 <- datak[-trainb, ]

  actual2 <- test_2$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_gp2 <- vglm(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = genpoisson0(),

    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # AIC AND BIC
  #------------------------------------------------------

  aic_gp2 <- AIC(model_gp2)

  bic_gp2 <- BIC(model_gp2)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_gp2 <- predict(

    model_gp2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_gp2 <- as.numeric(pred_gp2)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_gp2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_gp2 <- pred_gp2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_gp2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gp2,

    actual2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SAFE MAPE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nonzero <- actual2 != 0

  MAPE_gp2 <- mean(

    abs(

      (actual2[nonzero] -

       pred_gp2[nonzero]) /

       actual2[nonzero]

    ),

    na.rm = TRUE

  ) * 100

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  residuals_gp2 <- actual2 - pred_gp2

  lower_resid <- quantile(
    residuals_gp2,
    0.025,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  upper_resid <- quantile(
    residuals_gp2,
    0.975,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_gp2 <- pred_gp2 + lower_resid

  upper_gp2 <- pred_gp2 + upper_resid

  lower_gp2 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_gp2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_gp2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_gp2 &

      actual2 <= upper_gp2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_gp2 <- mean(

    upper_gp2 -

      lower_gp2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  split_gp2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_gp2,

    Lower_PI = lower_gp2,

    Upper_PI = upper_gp2
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GP2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),
    split_gp2
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_gp2 <- rbind(

    results_gp2,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      AIC = aic_gp2,

      BIC = bic_gp2,

      ME = acc_gp2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gp2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gp2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gp2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = MAPE_gp2,

      Coverage = coverage_gp2,

      Width = width_gp2
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_gp2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_gp2,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_gp2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Generalized Poisson",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_gp2$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_gp2$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gp2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gp2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gp2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gp2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gp2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gp2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gp2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gp2
```


#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# GENERALISED POISSON MODEL
# LINNET DATA
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(VGAM)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STORAGE
#========================================================

results_gp3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GENERALIZED POISSON : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  trainc <- sample(
    1:nrow(datak),
    0.90*nrow(datak)
  )

  train_3 <- datak[trainc, ]

  test_3 <- datak[-trainc, ]

  actual3 <- test_3$eggs

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------------------------

  model_gp3 <- vglm(

    eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

    family = genpoisson0(),

    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # AIC AND BIC
  #------------------------------------------------------

  aic_gp3 <- AIC(model_gp3)

  bic_gp3 <- BIC(model_gp3)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  pred_gp3 <- predict(

    model_gp3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_gp3 <- as.numeric(pred_gp3)

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_gp3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_gp3 <- pred_gp3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------------------------

  acc_gp3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gp3,

    actual3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # SAFE MAPE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  nonzero <- actual3 != 0

  MAPE_gp3 <- mean(

    abs(

      (actual3[nonzero] -

       pred_gp3[nonzero]) /

       actual3[nonzero]

    ),

    na.rm = TRUE

  ) * 100

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
  #------------------------------------------------------

  residuals_gp3 <- actual3 - pred_gp3

  lower_resid <- quantile(
    residuals_gp3,
    0.025,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  upper_resid <- quantile(
    residuals_gp3,
    0.975,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_gp3 <- pred_gp3 + lower_resid

  upper_gp3 <- pred_gp3 + upper_resid

  lower_gp3 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_gp3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # COVERAGE
  #------------------------------------------------------

  coverage_gp3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_gp3 &

      actual3 <= upper_gp3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # WIDTH
  #------------------------------------------------------

  width_gp3 <- mean(

    upper_gp3 -

      lower_gp3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE SPLIT
  #------------------------------------------------------

  split_gp3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_gp3,

    Lower_PI = lower_gp3,

    Upper_PI = upper_gp3
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GP3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),
    split_gp3
  )

  #------------------------------------------------------
  # STORE RESULTS
  #------------------------------------------------------

  results_gp3 <- rbind(

    results_gp3,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      AIC = aic_gp3,

      BIC = bic_gp3,

      ME = acc_gp3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gp3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gp3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gp3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = MAPE_gp3,

      Coverage = coverage_gp3,

      Width = width_gp3
    )
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_gp3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_gp3,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_gp3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Generalized Poisson",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_gp3$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_gp3$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gp3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gp3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gp3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gp3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gp3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gp3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gp3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gp3
```

##ZERO-TRUNCATED POISSON-MODEL
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED POISSON MODEL
# pospoisson()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(VGAM)

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# CHECK ZERO COUNTS
#========================================================

sum(datak$eggs == 0)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztp1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZTP1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# REMOVE ZERO COUNTS
#====================================================

train_1 <- train_1[
  train_1$eggs > 0,
]

test_1 <- test_1[
  test_1$eggs > 0,
]

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_1[] <- lapply(

  train_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_1[] <- lapply(

  test_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_1[
    sapply(
      train_1,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_1[[v]] <- factor(

    train_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_1[[v]] <- factor(

    test_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT ZTP MODEL
#====================================================

ztp_model1 <- vglm(

  eggs ~ .,

  family = pospoisson(),

  data = train_1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_ztp <- predict(

  ztp_model1,

  newdata = test_1,

  type = "response"
)

pre1_ztp <- as.numeric(
  pre1_ztp
)

pre1_ztp <- pmax(
  1,
  pre1_ztp
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual1
) & is.finite(
  pre1_ztp
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_ztp <- pre1_ztp[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztp1 <- actual1 - pre1_ztp

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid1 <- quantile(

  resid_ztp1,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid1 <- quantile(

  resid_ztp1,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_ztp1 <- pre1_ztp +

  lower_resid1

upper_ztp1 <- pre1_ztp +

  upper_resid1

#====================================================
# TRUNCATED COUNTS > 0
#====================================================

lower_ztp1 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztp1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztp1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_ztp1 &

    actual1 <= upper_ztp1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztp1 <- mean(

  upper_ztp1 -

    lower_ztp1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztp1 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual1 -

        pre1_ztp
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztp1 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual1 -

      pre1_ztp
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztp1 <- mean(

  actual1 -

    pre1_ztp
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztp1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_ztp1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztp1,

    MAE = MAE_ztp1,

    Coverage = coverage_ztp1,

    Width = width_ztp1,

    ME = ME_ztp1
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_ztp1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztp1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztp1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztp1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztp1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztp1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztp1
```

#80

```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED POISSON MODEL
# pospoisson()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 79:21 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#=======================================================

#========================================================
# CHECK ZERO COUNTS
#========================================================

sum(datak$eggs == 0)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztp2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZTP2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.79 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# REMOVE ZERO COUNTS
#====================================================

train_2 <- train_2[
  train_2$eggs > 0,
]

test_2 <- test_2[
  test_2$eggs > 0,
]

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_2[] <- lapply(

  train_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_2[] <- lapply(

  test_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_2[
    sapply(
      train_2,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_2[[v]] <- factor(

    train_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_2[[v]] <- factor(

    test_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT ZTP MODEL
#====================================================

ztp_model2 <- vglm(

  eggs ~ .,

  family = pospoisson(),

  data = train_2
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_ztp <- predict(

  ztp_model2,

  newdata = test_2,

  type = "response"
)

pre2_ztp <- as.numeric(
  pre2_ztp
)

pre2_ztp <- pmax(
  1,
  pre2_ztp
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual2
) & is.finite(
  pre2_ztp
)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index
]

pre2_ztp <- pre2_ztp[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztp2 <- actual2 - pre2_ztp

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid2 <- quantile(

  resid_ztp2,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid2 <- quantile(

  resid_ztp2,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_ztp2 <- pre2_ztp +

  lower_resid2

upper_ztp2 <- pre2_ztp +

  upper_resid2

#====================================================
# TRUNCATED COUNTS > 0
#====================================================

lower_ztp2 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztp2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztp2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_ztp2 &

    actual2 <= upper_ztp2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztp2 <- mean(

  upper_ztp2 -

    lower_ztp2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztp2 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual2 -

        pre2_ztp
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztp2 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual2 -

      pre2_ztp
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztp2 <- mean(

  actual2 -

    pre2_ztp
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztp2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_ztp2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztp2,

    MAE = MAE_ztp2,

    Coverage = coverage_ztp2,

    Width = width_ztp2,

    ME = ME_ztp2
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_ztp2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztp2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztp2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztp2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztp2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztp2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztp2
```


#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED POISSON MODEL
# pospoisson()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 88:12 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#=======================================================

#========================================================
# CHECK ZERO COUNTS
#========================================================

sum(datak$eggs == 0)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztp3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZTP3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.88 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# REMOVE ZERO COUNTS
#====================================================

train_3 <- train_3[
  train_3$eggs > 0,
]

test_3 <- test_3[
  test_3$eggs > 0,
]

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_3[] <- lapply(

  train_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_3[] <- lapply(

  test_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_3[
    sapply(
      train_3,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_3[[v]] <- factor(

    train_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_3[[v]] <- factor(

    test_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT ZTP MODEL
#====================================================

ztp_model3 <- vglm(

  eggs ~ .,

  family = pospoisson(),

  data = train_3
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_ztp <- predict(

  ztp_model3,

  newdata = test_3,

  type = "response"
)

pre3_ztp <- as.numeric(
  pre3_ztp
)

pre3_ztp <- pmax(
  1,
  pre3_ztp
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual3
) & is.finite(
  pre3_ztp
)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index
]

pre3_ztp <- pre3_ztp[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztp3 <- actual3 - pre3_ztp

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid3 <- quantile(

  resid_ztp3,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid3 <- quantile(

  resid_ztp3,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_ztp3 <- pre3_ztp +

  lower_resid3

upper_ztp3 <- pre3_ztp +

  upper_resid3

#====================================================
# TRUNCATED COUNTS > 0
#====================================================

lower_ztp3 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztp3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztp3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_ztp3 &

    actual3 <= upper_ztp3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztp3 <- mean(

  upper_ztp3 -

    lower_ztp3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztp3 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual3 -

        pre3_ztp
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztp3 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual3 -

      pre3_ztp
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztp3 <- mean(

  actual3 -

    pre3_ztp
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztp3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_ztp3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztp3,

    MAE = MAE_ztp3,

    Coverage = coverage_ztp3,

    Width = width_ztp3,

    ME = ME_ztp3
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_ztp3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztp3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztp3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztp3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztp3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztp3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztp3
```


##zero-truncated NB

```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# posnegbinomial()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(VGAM)

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# CHECK ZERO COUNTS
#========================================================

sum(datak$eggs == 0)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztnb1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZTNB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# REMOVE ZERO COUNTS
#====================================================

train_1 <- train_1[
  train_1$eggs > 0,
]

test_1 <- test_1[
  test_1$eggs > 0,
]

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_1[] <- lapply(

  train_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_1[] <- lapply(

  test_1,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_1[
    sapply(
      train_1,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_1[[v]] <- factor(

    train_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_1[[v]] <- factor(

    test_1[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT ZTNB MODEL
#====================================================

ztnb_model1 <- vglm(

  eggs ~ .,

  family = posnegbinomial(),

  data = train_1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_ztnb <- predict(

  ztnb_model1,

  newdata = test_1,

  type = "response"
)

pre1_ztnb <- as.numeric(
  pre1_ztnb
)

pre1_ztnb <- pmax(
  1,
  pre1_ztnb
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual1
) & is.finite(
  pre1_ztnb
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_ztnb <- pre1_ztnb[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztnb1 <- actual1 - pre1_ztnb

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid1 <- quantile(

  resid_ztnb1,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid1 <- quantile(

  resid_ztnb1,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_ztnb1 <- pre1_ztnb +

  lower_resid1

upper_ztnb1 <- pre1_ztnb +

  upper_resid1

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNT SAFETY
#====================================================

lower_ztnb1 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztnb1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztnb1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_ztnb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_ztnb1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztnb1 <- mean(

  upper_ztnb1 -

    lower_ztnb1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztnb1 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual1 -

        pre1_ztnb
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztnb1 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual1 -

      pre1_ztnb
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztnb1 <- mean(

  actual1 -

    pre1_ztnb
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztnb1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_ztnb1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztnb1,

    MAE = MAE_ztnb1,

    Coverage = coverage_ztnb1,

    Width = width_ztnb1,

    ME = ME_ztnb1
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_ztnb1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztnb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztnb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztnb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztnb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztnb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztnb1
```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# posnegbinomial()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 79:21 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# CHECK ZERO COUNTS
#========================================================

sum(datak$eggs == 0)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztnb2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZTNB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.80   * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# REMOVE ZERO COUNTS
#====================================================

train_2 <- train_2[
  train_2$eggs > 0,
]

test_2 <- test_2[
  test_2$eggs > 0,
]

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_2[] <- lapply(

  train_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_2[] <- lapply(

  test_2,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_2[
    sapply(
      train_2,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_2[[v]] <- factor(

    train_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_2[[v]] <- factor(

    test_2[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT ZTNB MODEL
#====================================================

ztnb_model2 <- vglm(

  eggs ~ .,

  family = posnegbinomial(),

  data = train_2
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_ztnb <- predict(

  ztnb_model2,

  newdata = test_2,

  type = "response"
)

pre2_ztnb <- as.numeric(
  pre2_ztnb
)

pre2_ztnb <- pmax(
  1,
  pre2_ztnb
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual2
) & is.finite(
  pre2_ztnb
)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index
]

pre2_ztnb <- pre2_ztnb[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztnb2 <- actual2 - pre2_ztnb

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid2 <- quantile(

  resid_ztnb2,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid2 <- quantile(

  resid_ztnb2,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_ztnb2 <- pre2_ztnb +

  lower_resid2

upper_ztnb2 <- pre2_ztnb +

  upper_resid2

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNT SAFETY
#====================================================

lower_ztnb2 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztnb2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztnb2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_ztnb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_ztnb2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztnb2 <- mean(

  upper_ztnb2 -

    lower_ztnb2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztnb2 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual2 -

        pre2_ztnb
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztnb2 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual2 -

      pre2_ztnb
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztnb2 <- mean(

  actual2 -

    pre2_ztnb
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztnb2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_ztnb2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztnb2,

    MAE = MAE_ztnb2,

    Coverage = coverage_ztnb2,

    Width = width_ztnb2,

    ME = ME_ztnb2
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_ztnb2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztnb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztnb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztnb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztnb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztnb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztnb2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# posnegbinomial()
# EMPIRICAL RESIDUAL PI
# 88:12 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================
#========================================================
# CHECK ZERO COUNTS
#========================================================

sum(datak$eggs == 0)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztnb3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric(),

  ME = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZTNB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  0.90 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# REMOVE ZERO COUNTS
#====================================================

train_3 <- train_3[
  train_3$eggs > 0,
]

test_3 <- test_3[
  test_3$eggs > 0,
]

#====================================================
# CONVERT CHARACTER TO FACTOR
#====================================================

train_3[] <- lapply(

  train_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

test_3[] <- lapply(

  test_3,

  function(x){

    if(is.character(x)){

      as.factor(x)

    } else {

      x
    }
  }
)

#====================================================
# FIX FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================================

factor_vars <- names(

  train_3[
    sapply(
      train_3,
      is.factor
    )
  ]
)

for(v in factor_vars){

  train_3[[v]] <- factor(

    train_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )

  test_3[[v]] <- factor(

    test_3[[v]],

    levels = levels(
      factor(datak[[v]])
    )
  )
}

#====================================================
# FIT ZTNB MODEL
#====================================================

ztnb_model3 <- vglm(

  eggs ~ .,

  family = posnegbinomial(),

  data = train_3
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_ztnb <- predict(

  ztnb_model3,

  newdata = test_3,

  type = "response"
)

pre3_ztnb <- as.numeric(
  pre3_ztnb
)

pre3_ztnb <- pmax(
  1,
  pre3_ztnb
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(
  actual3
) & is.finite(
  pre3_ztnb
)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index
]

pre3_ztnb <- pre3_ztnb[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztnb3 <- actual3 - pre3_ztnb

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid3 <- quantile(

  resid_ztnb3,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid3 <- quantile(

  resid_ztnb3,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVALS
#====================================================

lower_ztnb3 <- pre3_ztnb +

  lower_resid3

upper_ztnb3 <- pre3_ztnb +

  upper_resid3

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNT SAFETY
#====================================================

lower_ztnb3 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztnb3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztnb3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_ztnb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_ztnb3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztnb3 <- mean(

  upper_ztnb3 -

    lower_ztnb3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztnb3 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (
      actual3 -

        pre3_ztnb
    )^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztnb3 <- mean(

  abs(

    actual3 -

      pre3_ztnb
  )
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztnb3 <- mean(

  actual3 -

    pre3_ztnb
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztnb3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(

  results_ztnb3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztnb3,

    MAE = MAE_ztnb3,

    Coverage = coverage_ztnb3,

    Width = width_ztnb3,

    ME = ME_ztnb3
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_ztnb3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztnb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztnb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztnb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztnb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztnb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztnb3
```


#DESCRETE WEIBULL


```{r}
#========================================================
# DISCRETE WEIBULL MODEL
# CUSTOM LOG-LIKELIHOOD
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STABLE DISCRETE WEIBULL LOG-LIKELIHOOD
#========================================================

dw_loglik1 <- function(par, y1, X1){

  p <- ncol(X1)

  gamma <- par[1:p]

  logit_q <- par[p + 1]

  beta <- exp(
    X1 %*% gamma
  )

  beta <- as.numeric(beta)

  q <- exp(logit_q) /
    (1 + exp(logit_q))

  q <- pmin(
    pmax(q, 1e-10),
    1 - 1e-10
  )

  term1 <- q^(y1^beta)

  term2 <- q^((y1 + 1)^beta)

  pmf <- term1 - term2

  pmf <- pmax(
    pmf,
    1e-12
  )

  loglik1 <- sum(
    log(pmf)
  )

  if(!is.finite(loglik1)){

    return(1e10)
  }

  return(-loglik1)
}

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_dw1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("DW CUSTOM : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X1 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = train_1
)

y1 <- train_1$eggs

X_test1 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = test_1
)

#====================================================
# INITIAL VALUES
#====================================================

init1 <- c(

  rep(0, ncol(X1)),

  0
)

#====================================================
# OPTIMIZATION
#====================================================

fit_dw1 <- optim(

  par = init1,

  fn = dw_loglik1,

  y1 = y1,

  X1 = X1,

  method = "BFGS",

  control = list(
    maxit = 1000
  )
)
#====================================================
# AIC AND BIC
#====================================================

logLik_dw1 <- -fit_dw1$value

k_dw1 <- length(fit_dw1$par)

n_dw1 <- length(y1)

AIC_dw1 <- -2 * logLik_dw1 + 2 * k_dw1

BIC_dw1 <- -2 * logLik_dw1 + log(n_dw1) * k_dw1
#====================================================
# PARAMETERS
#====================================================

p <- ncol(X_test1)

gamma_hat <- fit_dw1$par[1:p]

logit_q_hat <- fit_dw1$par[p + 1]

#====================================================
# q ESTIMATE
#====================================================

q_hat <- exp(logit_q_hat) /

  (1 + exp(logit_q_hat))

q_hat <- pmin(
  pmax(q_hat, 1e-10),
  1 - 1e-10
)

#====================================================
# BETA ESTIMATE
#====================================================

beta_hat <- exp(

  X_test1 %*% gamma_hat
)

beta_hat <- as.numeric(
  beta_hat
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_dw <- (

  -log(2) / log(q_hat)

)^(1 / beta_hat)

pre1_dw <- as.numeric(
  pre1_dw
)

pre1_dw <- pmax(
  0,
  pre1_dw
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(actual1) &
               is.finite(pre1_dw)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_dw <- pre1_dw[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CHECK EMPTY
#====================================================

if(length(actual1) == 0){

  stop("No valid observations")
}

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_dw1 <- actual1 - pre1_dw

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid1 <- quantile(
  resid_dw1,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid1 <- quantile(
  resid_dw1,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_dw1 <- pre1_dw +
  lower_resid1

upper_dw1 <- pre1_dw +
  upper_resid1

lower_dw1 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_dw1
)

#====================================================
# METRICS
#====================================================

coverage_dw1 <- mean(
  actual1 >= lower_dw1 &
  actual1 <= upper_dw1
)

width_dw1 <- mean(
  upper_dw1 - lower_dw1
)

RMSE_dw1 <- sqrt(
  mean(
    (actual1 - pre1_dw)^2
  )
)

MAE_dw1 <- mean(
  abs(actual1 - pre1_dw)
)

ME_dw1 <- mean(
  actual1 - pre1_dw
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_dw1 <- rbind(

  results_dw1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    AIC = AIC_dw1,

    BIC = BIC_dw1,

    RMSE = RMSE_dw1,

    MAE = MAE_dw1,

    Coverage = coverage_dw1,

    Width = width_dw1,

    ME = ME_dw1
  )
)
print(
  results_dw1[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_dw1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Discrete Weibull",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_dw1$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_dw1$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_dw1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_dw1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_dw1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_dw1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_dw1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_dw1
```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# DISCRETE WEIBULL MODEL
# CUSTOM LOG-LIKELIHOOD
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================
#========================================================
# STABLE DISCRETE WEIBULL LOG-LIKELIHOOD
#========================================================

dw_loglik2 <- function(par, y2, X2){

  p <- ncol(X2)

  gamma <- par[1:p]

  logit_q <- par[p + 1]

  beta <- exp(
    X2 %*% gamma
  )

  beta <- as.numeric(beta)

  q <- exp(logit_q) /
    (1 + exp(logit_q))

  q <- pmin(
    pmax(q, 1e-10),
    1 - 1e-10
  )

  term1 <- q^(y2^beta)

  term2 <- q^((y2 + 1)^beta)

  pmf <- term1 - term2

  pmf <- pmax(
    pmf,
    1e-12
  )

  loglik2 <- sum(
    log(pmf)
  )

  if(!is.finite(loglik2)){

    return(1e10)
  }

  return(-loglik2)
}

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_dw2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("DW CUSTOM 2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

trainb <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.80 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X2 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = train_2
)

y2 <- train_2$eggs

X_test2 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = test_2
)

#====================================================
# INITIAL VALUES
#====================================================

init2 <- c(

  rep(0, ncol(X2)),

  0
)

#====================================================
# OPTIMIZATION
#====================================================

fit_dw2 <- optim(

  par = init2,

  fn = dw_loglik2,

  y2 = y2,

  X2 = X2,

  method = "BFGS",

  control = list(
    maxit = 1000
  )
)
#====================================================
# AIC AND BIC
#====================================================

logLik_dw2 <- -fit_dw2$value

k_dw2 <- length(
  fit_dw2$par
)

n_dw2 <- length(y2)

AIC_dw2 <-

  -2 * logLik_dw2 +

  2 * k_dw2

BIC_dw2 <-

  -2 * logLik_dw2 +

  log(n_dw2) * k_dw2
#====================================================
# PARAMETERS
#====================================================

p <- ncol(X_test2)

gamma_hat <- fit_dw2$par[1:p]

logit_q_hat <- fit_dw2$par[p + 1]

#====================================================
# q ESTIMATE
#====================================================

q_hat <- exp(logit_q_hat) /

  (1 + exp(logit_q_hat))

q_hat <- pmin(
  pmax(q_hat, 1e-10),
  1 - 1e-10
)

#====================================================
# BETA ESTIMATE
#====================================================

beta_hat <- exp(

  X_test2 %*% gamma_hat
)

beta_hat <- as.numeric(
  beta_hat
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_dw <- (

  -log(2) / log(q_hat)

)^(1 / beta_hat)

pre2_dw <- as.numeric(
  pre2_dw
)

pre2_dw <- pmax(
  0,
  pre2_dw
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(actual2) &
               is.finite(pre2_dw)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index
]

pre2_dw <- pre2_dw[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CHECK EMPTY
#====================================================

if(length(actual2) == 0){

  stop("No valid observations")
}

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_dw2 <- actual2 - pre2_dw

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid2 <- quantile(
  resid_dw2,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid2 <- quantile(
  resid_dw2,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_dw2 <- pre2_dw +
  lower_resid2

upper_dw2 <- pre2_dw +
  upper_resid2

lower_dw2 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_dw2
)

#====================================================
# METRICS
#====================================================

coverage_dw2 <- mean(
  actual2 >= lower_dw2 &
  actual2 <= upper_dw2
)

width_dw2 <- mean(
  upper_dw2 - lower_dw2
)

RMSE_dw2 <- sqrt(
  mean(
    (actual2 - pre2_dw)^2
  )
)

MAE_dw2 <- mean(
  abs(actual2 - pre2_dw)
)

ME_dw2 <- mean(
  actual2 - pre2_dw
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_dw2 <- rbind(

  results_dw2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    AIC = AIC_dw2,

    BIC = BIC_dw2,

    RMSE = RMSE_dw2,

    MAE = MAE_dw2,

    Coverage = coverage_dw2,

    Width = width_dw2,

    ME = ME_dw2
  )
)

print(
  results_dw2[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_dw2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Discrete Weibull",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_dw2$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_dw2$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_dw2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_dw2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_dw2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_dw2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_dw2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_dw2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# DISCRETE WEIBULL MODEL
# CUSTOM LOG-LIKELIHOOD
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STABLE DISCRETE WEIBULL LOG-LIKELIHOOD
```
