```{r}
#========================================================

dw_loglik3 <- function(par, y3, X3){

  p <- ncol(X3)

  gamma <- par[1:p]

  logit_q <- par[p + 1]

  beta <- exp(
    X3 %*% gamma
  )

  beta <- as.numeric(beta)

  q <- exp(logit_q) /
    (1 + exp(logit_q))

  q <- pmin(
    pmax(q, 1e-10),
    1 - 1e-10
  )

  term1 <- q^(y3^beta)

  term2 <- q^((y3 + 1)^beta)

  pmf <- term1 - term2

  pmf <- pmax(
    pmf,
    1e-12
  )

  loglik3 <- sum(
    log(pmf)
  )

  if(!is.finite(loglik3)){

    return(1e10)
  }

  return(-loglik3)
}

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_dw3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("DW CUSTOM 3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

trainc <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.90 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X3 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = train_3
)

y3 <- train_3$eggs

X_test3 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = test_3
)

#====================================================
# INITIAL VALUES
#====================================================

init3 <- c(

  rep(0, ncol(X3)),

  0
)

#====================================================
# OPTIMIZATION
#====================================================

fit_dw3 <- optim(

  par = init3,

  fn = dw_loglik3,

  y3 = y3,

  X3 = X3,

  method = "BFGS",

  control = list(
    maxit = 1000
  )
)
#====================================================
# AIC AND BIC
#====================================================

logLik_dw3 <- -fit_dw3$value

k_dw3 <- length(
  fit_dw3$par
)

n_dw3 <- length(y3)

AIC_dw3 <-

  -2 * logLik_dw3 +

  2 * k_dw3

BIC_dw3 <-

  -2 * logLik_dw3 +

  log(n_dw3) * k_dw3
#====================================================
# PARAMETERS
#====================================================

p <- ncol(X_test3)

gamma_hat <- fit_dw3$par[1:p]

logit_q_hat <- fit_dw3$par[p + 1]

#====================================================
# q ESTIMATE
#====================================================

q_hat <- exp(logit_q_hat) /

  (1 + exp(logit_q_hat))

q_hat <- pmin(
  pmax(q_hat, 1e-10),
  1 - 1e-10
)

#====================================================
# BETA ESTIMATE
#====================================================

beta_hat <- exp(

  X_test3 %*% gamma_hat
)

beta_hat <- as.numeric(
  beta_hat
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_dw <- (

  -log(2) / log(q_hat)

)^(1 / beta_hat)

pre3_dw <- as.numeric(
  pre3_dw
)

pre3_dw <- pmax(
  0,
  pre3_dw
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(actual3) &
               is.finite(pre3_dw)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index
]

pre3_dw <- pre3_dw[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# CHECK EMPTY
#====================================================

if(length(actual3) == 0){

  stop("No valid observations")
}

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_dw3 <- actual3 - pre3_dw

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid3 <- quantile(
  resid_dw3,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid3 <- quantile(
  resid_dw3,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_dw3 <- pre3_dw +
  lower_resid3

upper_dw3 <- pre3_dw +
  upper_resid3

lower_dw3 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_dw3
)

#====================================================
# METRICS
#====================================================

coverage_dw3 <- mean(
  actual3 >= lower_dw3 &
  actual3 <= upper_dw3
)

width_dw3 <- mean(
  upper_dw3 - lower_dw3
)

RMSE_dw3 <- sqrt(
  mean(
    (actual3 - pre3_dw)^2
  )
)

MAE_dw3 <- mean(
  abs(actual3 - pre3_dw)
)

ME_dw3 <- mean(
  actual3 - pre3_dw
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_dw3 <- rbind(

  results_dw3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    AIC = AIC_dw3,

    BIC = BIC_dw3,

    RMSE = RMSE_dw3,

    MAE = MAE_dw3,

    Coverage = coverage_dw3,

    Width = width_dw3,

    ME = ME_dw3
  )
)

print(
  results_dw3[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_dw3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Discrete Weibull",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_dw3$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_dw3$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_dw3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_dw3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_dw3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_dw3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_dw3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_dw3
```

##ZERO-TRUNCATED-DW
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED DISCRETE WEIBULL
# CUSTOM MLE
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(Metrics)

library(forecast)

library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# LOG-LIKELIHOOD
#========================================================

ztdw_loglik1 <- function(
  par,
  y1,
  X1
){

  p1 <- ncol(X1)

  gamma1 <- par[1:p1]

  alpha1 <- par[p1 + 1]

  # beta
  eta1 <- X1 %*% gamma1

  beta1 <- exp(eta1)

  # q
  q1 <- exp(alpha1) /
    (1 + exp(alpha1))

  q1 <- pmin(
    pmax(q1, 1e-6),
    1 - 1e-6
  )

  # probabilities
  prob1 <- (
    q1^(y1^beta1) -
    q1^((y1 + 1)^beta1)
  ) / (1 - q1)

  prob1[
    !is.finite(prob1) |
    prob1 <= 0
  ] <- 1e-10

  return(
    -sum(log(prob1))
  )
}

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztdw1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZT-DW1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNTS ONLY
#====================================================

train_pos1 <- subset(
  train_1,
  eggs > 0
)

test_pos1 <- subset(
  test_1,
  eggs > 0
)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X1 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = train_pos1
)

y1 <- train_pos1$eggs

X_test1 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = test_pos1
)

#====================================================
# INITIAL VALUES
#====================================================

init1 <- c(
  rep(0, ncol(X1)),
  0
)

#====================================================
# OPTIMIZATION
#====================================================

fit_ztdw1 <- optim(

  par = init1,

  fn = ztdw_loglik1,

  y1 = y1,

  X1 = X1,

  method = "BFGS",

  control = list(
    maxit = 1000
  )
)

#====================================================
# PARAMETERS
#====================================================

p1 <- ncol(X_test1)

gamma_hat1 <- fit_ztdw1$par[
  1:p1
]

alpha_hat1 <- fit_ztdw1$par[
  p1 + 1
]

#====================================================
# q
#====================================================

q_hat1 <- exp(alpha_hat1) /
  (1 + exp(alpha_hat1))

q_hat1 <- pmin(
  pmax(q_hat1, 1e-6),
  1 - 1e-6
)

#====================================================
# beta
#====================================================

beta_hat1 <- exp(
  X_test1 %*% gamma_hat1
)

beta_hat1 <- as.numeric(
  beta_hat1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre1_ztdw <- (

  -log(2) / log(q_hat1)

)^(1 / beta_hat1)

pre1_ztdw <- as.numeric(
  pre1_ztdw
)

pre1_ztdw <- pmax(
  1,
  pre1_ztdw
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_pos1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

valid_index <- is.finite(actual1) &
               is.finite(pre1_ztdw)

actual1 <- actual1[
  valid_index
]

pre1_ztdw <- pre1_ztdw[
  valid_index
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztdw1 <- actual1 -
  pre1_ztdw

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid1 <- quantile(
  resid_ztdw1,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid1 <- quantile(
  resid_ztdw1,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_ztdw1 <- pre1_ztdw +
  lower_resid1

upper_ztdw1 <- pre1_ztdw +
  upper_resid1

lower_ztdw1 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztdw1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztdw1 <- mean(
  actual1 >= lower_ztdw1 &
  actual1 <= upper_ztdw1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztdw1 <- mean(
  upper_ztdw1 - lower_ztdw1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztdw1 <- sqrt(
  mean(
    (actual1 - pre1_ztdw)^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztdw1 <- mean(
  abs(actual1 - pre1_ztdw)
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztdw1 <- mean(
  actual1 - pre1_ztdw
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztdw1 <- rbind(

  results_ztdw1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztdw1,

    MAE = MAE_ztdw1,

    Coverage = coverage_ztdw1,

    Width = width_ztdw1,

    ME = ME_ztdw1
  )
)

print(
  results_ztdw1[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_ztdw1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw1$RMSE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw1$MAE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw1$Coverage),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw1$Width),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw1$ME),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztdw1
```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED DISCRETE WEIBULL
# CUSTOM MLE
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================
#========================================================
# LOG-LIKELIHOOD
#========================================================

ztdw_loglik2 <- function(
  par,
  y2,
  X2
){

  p2 <- ncol(X2)

  gamma2 <- par[1:p2]

  alpha2 <- par[p2 + 1]

  eta2 <- X2 %*% gamma2

  beta2 <- exp(eta2)

  q2 <- exp(alpha2) /
    (1 + exp(alpha2))

  q2 <- pmin(
    pmax(q2, 1e-6),
    1 - 1e-6
  )

  prob2 <- (
    q2^(y2^beta2) -
    q2^((y2 + 1)^beta2)
  ) / (1 - q2)

  prob2[
    !is.finite(prob2) |
    prob2 <= 0
  ] <- 1e-10

  return(
    -sum(log(prob2))
  )
}

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztdw2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZT-DW2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

trainb <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.80 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNTS ONLY
#====================================================

train_pos2 <- subset(
  train_2,
  eggs > 0
)

test_pos2 <- subset(
  test_2,
  eggs > 0
)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X2 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = train_pos2
)

y2 <- train_pos2$eggs

X_test2 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = test_pos2
)

#====================================================
# INITIAL VALUES
#====================================================

init2 <- c(
  rep(0, ncol(X2)),
  0
)

#====================================================
# OPTIMIZATION
#====================================================

fit_ztdw2 <- optim(

  par = init2,

  fn = ztdw_loglik2,

  y2 = y2,

  X2 = X2,

  method = "BFGS",

  control = list(
    maxit = 1000
  )
)

#====================================================
# PARAMETERS
#====================================================

p2 <- ncol(X_test2)

gamma_hat2 <- fit_ztdw2$par[
  1:p2
]

alpha_hat2 <- fit_ztdw2$par[
  p2 + 1
]

#====================================================
# q
#====================================================

q_hat2 <- exp(alpha_hat2) /
  (1 + exp(alpha_hat2))

q_hat2 <- pmin(
  pmax(q_hat2, 1e-6),
  1 - 1e-6
)

#====================================================
# beta
#====================================================

beta_hat2 <- exp(
  X_test2 %*% gamma_hat2
)

beta_hat2 <- as.numeric(
  beta_hat2
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre2_ztdw <- (

  -log(2) / log(q_hat2)

)^(1 / beta_hat2)

pre2_ztdw <- as.numeric(
  pre2_ztdw
)

pre2_ztdw <- pmax(
  1,
  pre2_ztdw
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_pos2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

valid_index2 <- is.finite(actual2) &
                is.finite(pre2_ztdw)

actual2 <- actual2[
  valid_index2
]

pre2_ztdw <- pre2_ztdw[
  valid_index2
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztdw2 <- actual2 -
  pre2_ztdw

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid2 <- quantile(
  resid_ztdw2,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid2 <- quantile(
  resid_ztdw2,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_ztdw2 <- pre2_ztdw +
  lower_resid2

upper_ztdw2 <- pre2_ztdw +
  upper_resid2

lower_ztdw2 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztdw2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztdw2 <- mean(
  actual2 >= lower_ztdw2 &
  actual2 <= upper_ztdw2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztdw2 <- mean(
  upper_ztdw2 - lower_ztdw2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztdw2 <- sqrt(
  mean(
    (actual2 - pre2_ztdw)^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztdw2 <- mean(
  abs(actual2 - pre2_ztdw)
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztdw2 <- mean(
  actual2 - pre2_ztdw
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztdw2 <- rbind(

  results_ztdw2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztdw2,

    MAE = MAE_ztdw2,

    Coverage = coverage_ztdw2,

    Width = width_ztdw2,

    ME = ME_ztdw2
  )
)

print(
  results_ztdw2[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}
#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_ztdw2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw2$RMSE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw2$MAE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw2$Coverage),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw2$Width),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw2$ME),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztdw2
```
#90

```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED DISCRETE WEIBULL
# CUSTOM MLE
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOG-LIKELIHOOD
#========================================================

ztdw_loglik3 <- function(
  par,
  y3,
  X3
){

  p3 <- ncol(X3)

  gamma3 <- par[1:p3]

  alpha3 <- par[p3 + 1]

  eta3 <- X3 %*% gamma3

  beta3 <- exp(eta3)

  q3 <- exp(alpha3) /
    (1 + exp(alpha3))

  q3 <- pmin(
    pmax(q3, 1e-6),
    1 - 1e-6
  )

  prob3 <- (
    q3^(y3^beta3) -
    q3^((y3 + 1)^beta3)
  ) / (1 - q3)

  prob3[
    !is.finite(prob3) |
    prob3 <= 0
  ] <- 1e-10

  return(
    -sum(log(prob3))
  )
}

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_ztdw3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZT-DW3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

trainc <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.90 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNTS ONLY
#====================================================

train_pos3 <- subset(
  train_3,
  eggs > 0
)

test_pos3 <- subset(
  test_3,
  eggs > 0
)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X3 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = train_pos3
)

y3 <- train_pos3$eggs

X_test3 <- model.matrix(
  eggs ~ .,
  data = test_pos3
)

#====================================================
# INITIAL VALUES
#====================================================

init3 <- c(
  rep(0, ncol(X3)),
  0
)

#====================================================
# OPTIMIZATION
#====================================================

fit_ztdw3 <- optim(

  par = init3,

  fn = ztdw_loglik3,

  y3 = y3,

  X3 = X3,

  method = "BFGS",

  control = list(
    maxit = 1000
  )
)

#====================================================
# PARAMETERS
#====================================================

p3 <- ncol(X_test3)

gamma_hat3 <- fit_ztdw3$par[
  1:p3
]

alpha_hat3 <- fit_ztdw3$par[
  p3 + 1
]

#====================================================
# q
#====================================================

q_hat3 <- exp(alpha_hat3) /
  (1 + exp(alpha_hat3))

q_hat3 <- pmin(
  pmax(q_hat3, 1e-6),
  1 - 1e-6
)

#====================================================
# beta
#====================================================

beta_hat3 <- exp(
  X_test3 %*% gamma_hat3
)

beta_hat3 <- as.numeric(
  beta_hat3
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pre3_ztdw <- (

  -log(2) / log(q_hat3)

)^(1 / beta_hat3)

pre3_ztdw <- as.numeric(
  pre3_ztdw
)

pre3_ztdw <- pmax(
  1,
  pre3_ztdw
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_pos3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

valid_index3 <- is.finite(actual3) &
                is.finite(pre3_ztdw)

actual3 <- actual3[
  valid_index3
]

pre3_ztdw <- pre3_ztdw[
  valid_index3
]

#====================================================
# RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_ztdw3 <- actual3 -
  pre3_ztdw

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILES
#====================================================

lower_resid3 <- quantile(
  resid_ztdw3,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid3 <- quantile(
  resid_ztdw3,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_ztdw3 <- pre3_ztdw +
  lower_resid3

upper_ztdw3 <- pre3_ztdw +
  upper_resid3

lower_ztdw3 <- pmax(
  1,
  lower_ztdw3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_ztdw3 <- mean(
  actual3 >= lower_ztdw3 &
  actual3 <= upper_ztdw3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_ztdw3 <- mean(
  upper_ztdw3 - lower_ztdw3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_ztdw3 <- sqrt(
  mean(
    (actual3 - pre3_ztdw)^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_ztdw3 <- mean(
  abs(actual3 - pre3_ztdw)
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_ztdw3 <- mean(
  actual3 - pre3_ztdw
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_ztdw3 <- rbind(

  results_ztdw3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_ztdw3,

    MAE = MAE_ztdw3,

    Coverage = coverage_ztdw3,

    Width = width_ztdw3,

    ME = ME_ztdw3
  )
)

print(
  results_ztdw3[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}
#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_ztdw3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw3$RMSE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw3$MAE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw3$Coverage),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw3$Width),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    as.numeric(results_ztdw3$ME),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)


summary_ztdw3
```
#ZERO-TRUNCATED CONAY
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED COM-POISSON
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# NOTE:
 library(glmmTMB) #     already loaded
#========================================================

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_com1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZT-COM1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.70 * nrow(datak)
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNTS ONLY
#====================================================

train_pos1 <- subset(
  train_1,
  eggs > 0
)

test_pos1 <- subset(
  test_1,
  eggs > 0
)

#====================================================
# SCALE USING TRAINING DATA
#====================================================

mean_cov1 <- mean(
  train_pos1$cov1
)

sd_cov1 <- sd(
  train_pos1$cov1
)

mean_cov2 <- mean(
  train_pos1$cov2
)

sd_cov2 <- sd(
  train_pos1$cov2
)

#====================================================
# SCALE TRAIN
#====================================================

train_pos1$cov1 <- (
  train_pos1$cov1 -
  mean_cov1
) / sd_cov1

train_pos1$cov2 <- (
  train_pos1$cov2 -
  mean_cov2
) / sd_cov2

#====================================================
# SCALE TEST
#====================================================

test_pos1$cov1 <- (
  test_pos1$cov1 -
  mean_cov1
) / sd_cov1

test_pos1$cov2 <- (
  test_pos1$cov2 -
  mean_cov2
) / sd_cov2

#====================================================
# FIT MODEL
#====================================================

compoi_model1 <- glmmTMB(

  eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

  family = compois(
    link = "log"
  ),

  data = train_pos1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

mu1 <- predict(

  compoi_model1,

  newdata = test_pos1,

  type = "response"
)

mu1 <- as.numeric(mu1)

mu1 <- pmax(
  1,
  mu1
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_com1 <- mu1 -
  0.8 * sqrt(mu1)

upper_com1 <- mu1 +
  0.8 * sqrt(mu1)

lower_com1 <- pmax(
  1,
  round(lower_com1)
)

upper_com1 <- round(
  upper_com1
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_pos1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_com1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_com1 &

  actual1 <= upper_com1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_com1 <- mean(

  upper_com1 -

  lower_com1
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_com1 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (actual1 - mu1)^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_com1 <- mean(

  abs(actual1 - mu1)
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_com1 <- mean(

  actual1 - mu1
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_com1 <- rbind(

  results_com1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_com1,

    MAE = MAE_com1,

    Coverage = coverage_com1,

    Width = width_com1,

    ME = ME_com1
  )
)

print(
  results_com1[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_com1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com1$RMSE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com1$MAE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com1$Coverage),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com1$Width),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com1$ME),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_com1
```

#80

```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED COM-POISSON
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# NOTE:
# library(glmmTMB) already loaded
#========================================================

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_com2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZT-COM2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(2000 + i)

trainb <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.80 * nrow(datak)
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNTS ONLY
#====================================================

train_pos2 <- subset(
  train_2,
  eggs > 0
)

test_pos2 <- subset(
  test_2,
  eggs > 0
)

#====================================================
# SCALE USING TRAINING DATA
#====================================================

mean_cov12 <- mean(
  train_pos2$cov1
)

sd_cov12 <- sd(
  train_pos2$cov1
)

mean_cov22 <- mean(
  train_pos2$cov2
)

sd_cov22 <- sd(
  train_pos2$cov2
)

#====================================================
# SCALE TRAIN
#====================================================

train_pos2$cov1 <- (
  train_pos2$cov1 -
  mean_cov12
) / sd_cov12

train_pos2$cov2 <- (
  train_pos2$cov2 -
  mean_cov22
) / sd_cov22

#====================================================
# SCALE TEST
#====================================================

test_pos2$cov1 <- (
  test_pos2$cov1 -
  mean_cov12
) / sd_cov12

test_pos2$cov2 <- (
  test_pos2$cov2 -
  mean_cov22
) / sd_cov22

#====================================================
# FIT MODEL
#====================================================

compoi_model2 <- glmmTMB(

  eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

  family = compois(
    link = "log"
  ),

  data = train_pos2
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

mu2 <- predict(

  compoi_model2,

  newdata = test_pos2,

  type = "response"
)

mu2 <- as.numeric(mu2)

mu2 <- pmax(
  1,
  mu2
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_com2 <- mu2 -
  0.8 * sqrt(mu2)

upper_com2 <- mu2 +
  0.8 * sqrt(mu2)

lower_com2 <- pmax(
  1,
  round(lower_com2)
)

upper_com2 <- round(
  upper_com2
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_pos2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_com2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_com2 &

  actual2 <= upper_com2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_com2 <- mean(

  upper_com2 -

  lower_com2
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_com2 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (actual2 - mu2)^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_com2 <- mean(

  abs(actual2 - mu2)
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_com2 <- mean(

  actual2 - mu2
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_com2 <- rbind(

  results_com2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_com2,

    MAE = MAE_com2,

    Coverage = coverage_com2,

    Width = width_com2,

    ME = ME_com2
  )
)

print(
  results_com2[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_com2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com2$RMSE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com2$MAE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com2$Coverage),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com2$Width),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com2$ME),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_com2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# ZERO-TRUNCATED COM-POISSON
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_com3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")

cat("ZT-COM3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(3000 + i)

trainc <- sample(
  1:nrow(datak),
  0.90 * nrow(datak)
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# POSITIVE COUNTS ONLY
#====================================================

train_pos3 <- subset(
  train_3,
  eggs > 0
)

test_pos3 <- subset(
  test_3,
  eggs > 0
)

#====================================================
# SCALE USING TRAINING DATA
#====================================================

mean_cov13 <- mean(
  train_pos3$cov1
)

sd_cov13 <- sd(
  train_pos3$cov1
)

mean_cov23 <- mean(
  train_pos3$cov2
)

sd_cov23 <- sd(
  train_pos3$cov2
)

#====================================================
# SCALE TRAIN
#====================================================

train_pos3$cov1 <- (
  train_pos3$cov1 -
  mean_cov13
) / sd_cov13

train_pos3$cov2 <- (
  train_pos3$cov2 -
  mean_cov23
) / sd_cov23

#====================================================
# SCALE TEST
#====================================================

test_pos3$cov1 <- (
  test_pos3$cov1 -
  mean_cov13
) / sd_cov13

test_pos3$cov2 <- (
  test_pos3$cov2 -
  mean_cov23
) / sd_cov23

#====================================================
# FIT MODEL
#====================================================

compoi_model3 <- glmmTMB(

  eggs ~ cov1 + cov2,

  family = compois(
    link = "log"
  ),

  data = train_pos3
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

mu3 <- predict(

  compoi_model3,

  newdata = test_pos3,

  type = "response"
)

mu3 <- as.numeric(mu3)

mu3 <- pmax(
  1,
  mu3
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_com3 <- mu3 -
  0.8 * sqrt(mu3)

upper_com3 <- mu3 +
  0.8 * sqrt(mu3)

lower_com3 <- pmax(
  1,
  round(lower_com3)
)

upper_com3 <- round(
  upper_com3
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_pos3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_com3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_com3 &

  actual3 <= upper_com3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_com3 <- mean(

  upper_com3 -

  lower_com3
)

#====================================================
# RMSE
#====================================================

RMSE_com3 <- sqrt(

  mean(

    (actual3 - mu3)^2
  )
)

#====================================================
# MAE
#====================================================

MAE_com3 <- mean(

  abs(actual3 - mu3)
)

#====================================================
# ME
#====================================================

ME_com3 <- mean(

  actual3 - mu3
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_com3 <- rbind(

  results_com3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_com3,

    MAE = MAE_com3,

    Coverage = coverage_com3,

    Width = width_com3,

    ME = ME_com3
  )
)

print(
  results_com3[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "failed:",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_com3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com3$RMSE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com3$MAE),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com3$Coverage),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com3$Width),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    as.numeric(results_com3$ME),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_com3
```
#GLM COMPARISON
```{r}
#====================================================
# MODEL COMPARISON TABLE (70:30 SPLIT)
#====================================================

compare_70 <- rbind(

  data.frame(
    Model = "Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_poi1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_poi1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_poi1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_poi1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_poi1$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Negative Binomial",
    RMSE = summary_nb1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_nb1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_nb1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_nb1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_nb1$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "COM-Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_cmp1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_cmp1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_cmp1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_cmp1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_cmp1$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Quasi-Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_quasi1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_quasi1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_quasi1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_quasi1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_quasi1$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized NB",
    RMSE = summary_gnb1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_gnb1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_gnb1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_gnb1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_gnb1$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_gp1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_gp1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_gp1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_gp1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_gp1$Mean_Width
  ),
  data.frame(
    Model = "Descrete-weibull",
    RMSE = summary_dw1$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_dw1$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_dw1$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_dw1$Mean_Coverage,
    Width =summary_dw1$Mean_Width
  )
)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

compare_70$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_70$RMSE)

compare_70$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_70$MAE)

compare_70$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_70$ME))

compare_70$Coverage_Rank <- rank(-compare_70$Coverage)

compare_70$Width_Rank <- rank(compare_70$Width)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_70$Overall_Rank <-

  compare_70$RMSE_Rank +

  compare_70$MAE_Rank +

  compare_70$ME_Rank +

  compare_70$Coverage_Rank +

  compare_70$Width_Rank

compare_70 <- compare_70[
  order(compare_70$Overall_Rank),
]

compare_70
library(xtable)

print(

  xtable(compare_70),

  include.rownames = FALSE,

  file = "compare_70_linnet.tex"

)
print(compare_70)
```
#80
```{r}
#====================================================
# MODEL COMPARISON TABLE
# 80:20 SPLIT
#====================================================

compare_80 <- rbind(

  data.frame(
    Model = "Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_poi2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_poi2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_poi2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_poi2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_poi2$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Negative Binomial",
    RMSE = summary_nb2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_nb2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_nb2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_nb2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_nb2$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_gp2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_gp2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_gp2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_gp2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_gp2$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized NB",
    RMSE = summary_gnb2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_gnb2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_gnb2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_gnb2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_gnb2$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "COM-Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_cmp2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_cmp2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_cmp2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_cmp2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_cmp2$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Quasi-Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_quasi2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_quasi2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_quasi2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_quasi2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_quasi2$Mean_Width
  ),
  
  data.frame(
    Model = "Descrete-Weibull",
    RMSE = summary_dw2$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_dw2$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_dw2$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_dw2$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_dw2$Mean_Width
  )
)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

compare_80$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$RMSE)

compare_80$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$MAE)

compare_80$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_80$ME))

compare_80$Coverage_Rank <- rank(-compare_80$Coverage)

compare_80$Width_Rank <- rank(compare_80$Width)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_80$Overall_Rank <-

  compare_80$RMSE_Rank +

  compare_80$MAE_Rank +

  compare_80$ME_Rank +

  compare_80$Coverage_Rank +

  compare_80$Width_Rank

#====================================================
# SORT
#====================================================

compare_80 <- compare_80[
  order(compare_80$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_80) <- NULL

compare_80
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

latex_compare80 <- kable(

  compare_80,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  digits = 4,

  align = "c",

  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models under the 80:20 Train--Test Split"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 8
)

writeLines(

  as.character(latex_compare80),

  "compare_80_linnet.tex"
)
print(compare_80)
```
#90
```{r}

#====================================================
# MODEL COMPARISON TABLE
# 90:10 SPLIT
#====================================================

compare_90 <- rbind(

  data.frame(
    Model = "Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_poi3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_poi3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_poi3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_poi3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_poi3$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Negative Binomial",
    RMSE = summary_nb3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_nb3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_nb3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_nb3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_nb3$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_gp3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_gp3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_gp3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_gp3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_gp3$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized NB",
    RMSE = summary_gnb3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_gnb3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_gnb3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_gnb3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_gnb3$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "COM-Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_cmp3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_cmp3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_cmp3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_cmp3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_cmp3$Mean_Width
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Quasi-Poisson",
    RMSE = summary_quasi3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_quasi3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_quasi3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_quasi3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_quasi3$Mean_Width
  ),
  

  data.frame(
    Model = "Descrete-weibull",
    RMSE = summary_dw3$Mean_RMSE,
    MAE = summary_dw3$Mean_MAE,
    ME = summary_dw3$Mean_ME,
    Coverage = summary_dw3$Mean_Coverage,
    Width = summary_dw3$Mean_Width
  )
)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

compare_90$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_90$RMSE)

compare_90$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_90$MAE)

compare_90$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_90$ME))

compare_90$Coverage_Rank <- rank(-compare_90$Coverage)

compare_90$Width_Rank <- rank(compare_90$Width)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_90$Overall_Rank <-

  compare_90$RMSE_Rank +

  compare_90$MAE_Rank +

  compare_90$ME_Rank +

  compare_90$Coverage_Rank +

  compare_90$Width_Rank

#====================================================
# SORT BY OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_90 <- compare_90[
  order(compare_90$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_90) <- NULL

compare_90
#========================================================
# EXPORT 90:10 MODEL COMPARISON TABLE TO OVERLEAF
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#========================================================
# CREATE COPY
#========================================================

compare_90_export <- compare_90

#========================================================
# ROUND NUMERIC VALUES
#========================================================

compare_90_export$RMSE <- round(compare_90_export$RMSE,4)

compare_90_export$MAE <- round(compare_90_export$MAE,4)

compare_90_export$ME <- round(compare_90_export$ME,4)

compare_90_export$Coverage <- round(compare_90_export$Coverage,4)

compare_90_export$Width <- round(compare_90_export$Width,4)

#========================================================
# LATEX TABLE
#========================================================

latex_table_90 <- kable(

  compare_90_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models for the Linnet Dataset under the 90:10 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:linnet90"

) %>%

  kable_styling(

    latex_options = c(
      "hold_position",
      "scale_down"
    ),

    font_size = 8,

    full_width = FALSE

  )

#========================================================
# EXPORT TEX FILE
#========================================================

writeLines(

  as.character(latex_table_90),

  "compare_90_linnet.tex"

)

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_90_linnet.tex\n"
)
print(compare_90)
```

#AIC
```{r}
#====================================================
# AIC-BIC COMPARISON TABLE
# 70:30 SPLIT
#====================================================

AIC_BIC_70_Final <- rbind(

  data.frame(
    Model = "Poisson",
    AIC = AIC(poi_model1),
    BIC = BIC(poi_model1)
  ),
 

  data.frame(
    Model = "Negative Binomial",
    AIC = AIC(train1_nb),
   BIC = BIC(train1_nb)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized Poisson",
    AIC =aic_gp1,
    BIC = bic_gp1
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized NB",
    AIC = AIC(model_gnb1),
    BIC =AIC(model_gnb1)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "COM-Poisson",
    AIC = AIC(train1_cmp),
    BIC = BIC(train1_cmp)
  ),
   data.frame(
    Model = "Descrete-weibull",
    AIC = summary_dw1$Mean_AIC,
    BIC = summary_dw1$Mean_BIC
  )
)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

AIC_BIC_70_Final$AIC_Rank <-
  rank(AIC_BIC_70_Final$AIC)

AIC_BIC_70_Final$BIC_Rank <-
  rank(AIC_BIC_70_Final$BIC)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

AIC_BIC_70_Final$Overall_Rank <-

  AIC_BIC_70_Final$AIC_Rank +

  AIC_BIC_70_Final$BIC_Rank

AIC_BIC_70_Final <-

  AIC_BIC_70_Final[
    order(AIC_BIC_70_Final$Overall_Rank),
  ]

rownames(AIC_BIC_70_Final) <- NULL

AIC_BIC_70_Final
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

AIC_BIC_70_export <- AIC_BIC_70_Final

AIC_BIC_70_export$AIC <-
  round(AIC_BIC_70_export$AIC,3)

AIC_BIC_70_export$BIC <-
  round(AIC_BIC_70_export$BIC,3)

latex_AIC_BIC_70 <- kable(

  AIC_BIC_70_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption =
  "AIC and BIC Comparison of Count Regression Models for the Linnet Dataset under the 70:30 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:aicbic70_linnet"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 8
)

writeLines(

  as.character(
    latex_AIC_BIC_70
  ),

  "aic_bic_70_linnet.tex"
)
```
#80
```{r}
#====================================================
# AIC-BIC COMPARISON TABLE
# 80:20 SPLIT
#====================================================

AIC_BIC_80_Final <- rbind(

  data.frame(
    Model = "Poisson",
    AIC = AIC(poi_model2),
    BIC = BIC(poi_model2)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Negative Binomial",
    AIC = AIC(train2_nb),
    BIC = BIC(train2_nb)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized Poisson",
    AIC = aic_gp2,
    BIC = bic_gp2
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized NB",
    AIC = AIC(model_gnb2),
    BIC = BIC(model_gnb2)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "COM-Poisson",
    AIC = AIC(train2_cmp),
    BIC = BIC(train2_cmp)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Discrete Weibull",
    AIC = summary_dw2$Mean_AIC,
    BIC = summary_dw2$Mean_BIC
  )
)

AIC_BIC_80_Final$AIC_Rank <-
  rank(AIC_BIC_80_Final$AIC)

AIC_BIC_80_Final$BIC_Rank <-
  rank(AIC_BIC_80_Final$BIC)

AIC_BIC_80_Final$Overall_Rank <-

  AIC_BIC_80_Final$AIC_Rank +

  AIC_BIC_80_Final$BIC_Rank

AIC_BIC_80_Final <-

  AIC_BIC_80_Final[
    order(AIC_BIC_80_Final$Overall_Rank),
  ]

rownames(AIC_BIC_80_Final) <- NULL

AIC_BIC_80_Final
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

AIC_BIC_80_export <- AIC_BIC_80_Final

AIC_BIC_80_export$AIC <-
  round(AIC_BIC_80_export$AIC,3)

AIC_BIC_80_export$BIC <-
  round(AIC_BIC_80_export$BIC,3)

latex_AIC_BIC_80 <- kable(

  AIC_BIC_80_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption =
  "AIC and BIC Comparison of Count Regression Models for the Linnet Dataset under the 80:20 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:aicbic80_linnet"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 8
)

writeLines(

  as.character(
    latex_AIC_BIC_80
  ),

  "aic_bic_80_linnet.tex"
)
```
#90
```{r}
#====================================================
# AIC-BIC COMPARISON TABLE
# 90:10 SPLIT
#====================================================

AIC_BIC_90_Final <- rbind(

  data.frame(
    Model = "Poisson",
    AIC = AIC(poi_model3),
    BIC = BIC(poi_model3)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Negative Binomial",
    AIC = AIC(train3_nb),
    BIC = BIC(train3_nb)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized Poisson",
    AIC = aic_gp3,
    BIC = bic_gp3
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Generalized NB",
    AIC = AIC(model_gnb3),
    BIC = BIC(model_gnb3)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "COM-Poisson",
    AIC = AIC(train3_cmp),
    BIC = BIC(train3_cmp)
  ),

  data.frame(
    Model = "Discrete Weibull",
    AIC = summary_dw3$Mean_AIC,
    BIC = summary_dw3$Mean_BIC
  )
)

AIC_BIC_90_Final$AIC_Rank <-
  rank(AIC_BIC_90_Final$AIC)

AIC_BIC_90_Final$BIC_Rank <-
  rank(AIC_BIC_90_Final$BIC)

AIC_BIC_90_Final$Overall_Rank <-

  AIC_BIC_90_Final$AIC_Rank +

  AIC_BIC_90_Final$BIC_Rank

AIC_BIC_90_Final <-

  AIC_BIC_90_Final[
    order(AIC_BIC_90_Final$Overall_Rank),
  ]

rownames(AIC_BIC_90_Final) <- NULL

AIC_BIC_90_Final
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

AIC_BIC_90_export <- AIC_BIC_90_Final

AIC_BIC_90_export$AIC <-
  round(AIC_BIC_90_export$AIC,3)

AIC_BIC_90_export$BIC <-
  round(AIC_BIC_90_export$BIC,3)

latex_AIC_BIC_90 <- kable(

  AIC_BIC_90_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption =
  "AIC and BIC Comparison of Count Regression Models for the Linnet Dataset under the 90:10 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:aicbic90_linnet"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 8
)

writeLines(

  as.character(
    latex_AIC_BIC_90
  ),

  "aic_bic_90_linnet.tex"
)
print(AIC_BIC_90_Final)
```

#MACHINE-LEARNING


#Random-forest
```{r}
#========================================================
# RANDOM FOREST
# QUANTILE RANDOM FOREST PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(randomForest)
library(quantregForest)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)


#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_rf1 <- data.frame(
  Replication = numeric(),
  RMSE        = numeric(),
  MAE         = numeric(),
  ME          = numeric(),
  MPE         = numeric(),
  MAPE        = numeric(),
  Coverage    = numeric(),
  Width       = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("RF1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  tryCatch({

    #====================================================
    # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
    #====================================================

    set.seed(1000 + i)

    traina <- sample(
      1:nrow(datak),
      size  = floor(0.70 * nrow(datak)),
      replace = FALSE
    )

    train_1 <- datak[ traina, ]
    test_1  <- datak[-traina, ]

    #====================================================
    # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
    #====================================================

    train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
    test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

    if(nrow(train_1) < 10 || nrow(test_1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: insufficient data\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # RANDOM FOREST MODEL
    #====================================================

    rf_model1 <- randomForest(
      eggs ~ .,
      data  = train_1,
      ntree = 500
    )

    #====================================================
    # DESIGN MATRICES
    #====================================================

    x_train1 <- model.matrix(eggs ~ ., data = train_1)[, -1]
    y_train1 <- train_1$eggs
    x_test1  <- model.matrix(eggs ~ ., data = test_1)[, -1]

    # Align columns: test must match train exactly
    missing_cols <- setdiff(colnames(x_train1), colnames(x_test1))
    for(col in missing_cols){
      x_test1 <- cbind(x_test1, setNames(data.frame(rep(0, nrow(x_test1))), col))
    }
    x_test1 <- x_test1[, colnames(x_train1), drop = FALSE]

    #====================================================
    # QUANTILE RANDOM FOREST
    #====================================================

    qrf1 <- quantregForest(
      x     = x_train1,
      y     = y_train1,
      ntree = 500
    )

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTION INTERVALS
    #====================================================

    lower_rf1 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf1, x_test1, what = 0.025))
    upper_rf1 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf1, x_test1, what = 0.975))

    #====================================================
    # POINT PREDICTIONS
    #====================================================

    pred_rf1 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf1, x_test1, what = 0.500))
    pred_rf1 <- pmax(0, pred_rf1)

    #====================================================
    # ACTUAL VALUES
    #====================================================

    actual1 <- as.numeric(test_1$eggs)

    #====================================================
    # VALID OBSERVATIONS
    #====================================================

    keep <- complete.cases(actual1, pred_rf1, lower_rf1, upper_rf1)

    actual1   <- actual1[keep]
    pred_rf1  <- pred_rf1[keep]
    lower_rf1 <- lower_rf1[keep]
    upper_rf1 <- upper_rf1[keep]

    if(length(actual1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: too few valid observations\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # ACCURACY MEASURES
    #====================================================

    acc_rf1  <- forecast::accuracy(pred_rf1, actual1)

    RMSE_rf1 <- acc_rf1[1, "RMSE"]
    MAE_rf1  <- acc_rf1[1, "MAE"]
    ME_rf1   <- acc_rf1[1, "ME"]
    MPE_rf1  <- acc_rf1[1, "MPE"]
    MAPE_rf1 <- acc_rf1[1, "MAPE"]

    #====================================================
    # COVERAGE
    #====================================================

    coverage_rf1 <- mean(
      actual1 >= lower_rf1 &
      actual1 <= upper_rf1
    )

    #====================================================
    # WIDTH
    #====================================================

    width_rf1 <- mean(upper_rf1 - lower_rf1)

    #====================================================
    # STORE SPLIT
    #====================================================

    split_rf1 <- data.frame(
      Actual    = actual1,
      Predicted = pred_rf1,
      Lower_PI  = lower_rf1,
      Upper_PI  = upper_rf1
    )

    assign(paste0("RF1_SPLIT_", i), split_rf1)

    #====================================================
    # STORE RESULTS
    #====================================================

    results_rf1 <- rbind(
      results_rf1,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        RMSE        = RMSE_rf1,
        MAE         = MAE_rf1,
        ME          = ME_rf1,
        MPE         = MPE_rf1,
        MAPE        = MAPE_rf1,
        Coverage    = coverage_rf1,
        Width       = width_rf1
      )
    )

    print(results_rf1[nrow(results_rf1), ])
    cat("Replication", i, "completed\n")

  }, error = function(e){
    cat("Replication", i, "failed :", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_rf1 <- data.frame(
  Model         = "Random Forest",
  Split         = "70%",
  Mean_RMSE     = mean(results_rf1$RMSE,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MAE      = mean(results_rf1$MAE,      na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_ME       = mean(results_rf1$ME,       na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MPE      = mean(results_rf1$MPE,      na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MAPE     = mean(results_rf1$MAPE,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_rf1$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Width    = mean(results_rf1$Width,    na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_rf1)
```
#80
```{r}
#================================================
# RANDOM FOREST
# QUANTILE RANDOM FOREST PI
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#================================================

library(randomForest)
library(quantregForest)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#================================================

results_rf2 <- data.frame(
  Replication = numeric(),
  RMSE        = numeric(),
  MAE         = numeric(),
  ME          = numeric(),
  MPE         = numeric(),
  MAPE        = numeric(),
  Coverage    = numeric(),
  Width       = numeric()
)

#================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#================================================

R <- 100

#================================================
# LOOP
#================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("RF2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  tryCatch({

    #============================================
    # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
    #============================================

    set.seed(1000 + i)

    traina <- sample(
      1:nrow(datak),
      size    = floor(0.80 * nrow(datak)),
      replace = FALSE
    )

    train_1 <- datak[ trainb, ]
    test_1  <- datak[-trainb, ]

    #============================================
    # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
    #============================================

    train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
    test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

    if(nrow(train_1) < 10 || nrow(test_1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: insufficient data\n")
      next
    }

    #============================================
    # RANDOM FOREST MODEL
    #============================================

    rf_model2 <- randomForest(
      eggs ~ .,
      data  = train_1,
      ntree = 500
    )

    #============================================
    # DESIGN MATRICES
    #============================================

    x_train1 <- model.matrix(eggs ~ ., data = train_1)[, -1]
    y_train1 <- train_1$eggs
    x_test1  <- model.matrix(eggs ~ ., data = test_1)[, -1]

    # Align columns: test must match train exactly
    missing_cols <- setdiff(colnames(x_train1), colnames(x_test1))
    for(col in missing_cols){
      x_test1 <- cbind(x_test1, setNames(data.frame(rep(0, nrow(x_test1))), col))
    }
    x_test1 <- x_test1[, colnames(x_train1), drop = FALSE]

    #============================================
    # QUANTILE RANDOM FOREST
    #============================================

    qrf2 <- quantregForest(
      x     = x_train1,
      y     = y_train1,
      ntree = 500
    )

    #============================================
    # PREDICTION INTERVALS
    #============================================

    lower_rf2 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf2, x_test1, what = 0.025))
    upper_rf2 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf2, x_test1, what = 0.975))

    #============================================
    # POINT PREDICTIONS
    #============================================

    pred_rf2 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf2, x_test1, what = 0.500))
    pred_rf2 <- pmax(0, pred_rf2)

    #============================================
    # ACTUAL VALUES
    #============================================

    actual1 <- as.numeric(test_1$eggs)

    #============================================
    # VALID OBSERVATIONS
    #============================================

    keep <- complete.cases(actual1, pred_rf2, lower_rf2, upper_rf2)

    actual1   <- actual1[keep]
    pred_rf2  <- pred_rf2[keep]
    lower_rf2 <- lower_rf2[keep]
    upper_rf2 <- upper_rf2[keep]

    if(length(actual1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: too few valid observations\n")
      next
    }

    #============================================
    # ACCURACY MEASURES
    #============================================

    acc_rf2  <- forecast::accuracy(pred_rf2, actual1)

    RMSE_rf2 <- acc_rf2[1, "RMSE"]
    MAE_rf2  <- acc_rf2[1, "MAE"]
    ME_rf2   <- acc_rf2[1, "ME"]
    MPE_rf2  <- acc_rf2[1, "MPE"]
    MAPE_rf2 <- acc_rf2[1, "MAPE"]

    #============================================
    # COVERAGE
    #============================================
    coverage_rf2 <- mean(
      actual1 >= lower_rf2 &
      actual1 <= upper_rf2
    )

    #============================================
    # WIDTH
    #============================================

    width_rf2 <- mean(upper_rf2 - lower_rf2)

    #===========================================
    # STORE SPLIT
    #============================================
    split_rf2 <- data.frame(
      Actual    = actual1,
      Predicted = pred_rf2,
      Lower_PI  = lower_rf2,
      Upper_PI  = upper_rf2
    )

    assign(paste0("RF2_SPLIT_", i), split_rf2)

    #============================================
    # STORE RESULTS
    #============================================

    results_rf2 <- rbind(
      results_rf2,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        RMSE        = RMSE_rf2,
        MAE         = MAE_rf2,
        ME          = ME_rf2,
        MPE         = MPE_rf2,
        MAPE        = MAPE_rf2,
        Coverage    = coverage_rf2,
        Width       = width_rf2
      )
    )

    print(results_rf2[nrow(results_rf2), ])
    cat("Replication", i, "completed\n")

  }, error = function(e){
    cat("Replication", i, "failed :", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

#================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#================================================
summary_rf2 <- data.frame(
  Model         = "Random Forest",
  Split         = "80%",
  Mean_RMSE     = mean(results_rf2$RMSE,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MAE      = mean(results_rf2$MAE,      na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_ME       = mean(results_rf2$ME,       na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MPE      = mean(results_rf2$MPE,      na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MAPE     = mean(results_rf2$MAPE,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_rf2$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Width    = mean(results_rf2$Width,    na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_rf2)

```

#90
```{r}
#================================================
# RANDOM FOREST
# QUANTILE RANDOM FOREST PI
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#================================================

#================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#================================================

results_rf3 <- data.frame(
  Replication = numeric(),
  RMSE        = numeric(),
  MAE         = numeric(),
  ME          = numeric(),
  MPE         = numeric(),
  MAPE        = numeric(),
  Coverage    = numeric(),
  Width       = numeric()
)

#================================================
# LOOP
#================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("RF3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  tryCatch({

    #============================================
    # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
    #============================================

    set.seed(1000 + i)

    traina <- sample(
      1:nrow(datak),
      size    = floor(0.90 * nrow(datak)),
      replace = FALSE
    )

    train_1 <- datak[ trainc, ]
    test_1  <- datak[-trainc, ]

    #============================================
    # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
    #============================================

    train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
    test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

    if(nrow(train_1) < 10 || nrow(test_1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: insufficient data\n")
      next
    }

    #============================================
    # RANDOM FOREST MODEL
    #============================================

    rf_model3 <- randomForest(
      eggs ~ .,
      data  = train_1,
      ntree = 500
    )

    #============================================
    # DESIGN MATRICES
    #============================================

    x_train1 <- model.matrix(eggs ~ ., data = train_1)[, -1]
    y_train1 <- train_1$eggs
    x_test1  <- model.matrix(eggs ~ ., data = test_1)[, -1]

    # Align columns: test must match train exactly
    missing_cols <- setdiff(colnames(x_train1), colnames(x_test1))
    for(col in missing_cols){
      x_test1 <- cbind(x_test1, setNames(data.frame(rep(0, nrow(x_test1))), col))
    }
    x_test1 <- x_test1[, colnames(x_train1), drop = FALSE]

    #============================================
    # QUANTILE RANDOM FOREST
    #============================================

    qrf3 <- quantregForest(
      x     = x_train1,
      y     = y_train1,
      ntree = 500
    )

    #============================================
    # PREDICTION INTERVALS
    #============================================

    lower_rf3 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf3, x_test1, what = 0.025))
    upper_rf3 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf3, x_test1, what = 0.975))

    #============================================
    # POINT PREDICTIONS
    #============================================

    pred_rf3 <- as.numeric(predict(qrf3, x_test1, what = 0.500))
    pred_rf3 <- pmax(0, pred_rf3)

    #============================================
    # ACTUAL VALUES
    #============================================

    actual1 <- as.numeric(test_1$eggs)

    #============================================
    # VALID OBSERVATIONS
    #============================================

    keep <- complete.cases(actual1, pred_rf3, lower_rf3, upper_rf3)

    actual1   <- actual1[keep]
    pred_rf3  <- pred_rf3[keep]
    lower_rf3 <- lower_rf3[keep]
    upper_rf3 <- upper_rf3[keep]

    if(length(actual1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: too few valid observations\n")
      next
    }

    #============================================
    # ACCURACY MEASURES
    #============================================

    acc_rf3  <- forecast::accuracy(pred_rf3, actual1)

    RMSE_rf3 <- acc_rf3[1, "RMSE"]
    MAE_rf3  <- acc_rf3[1, "MAE"]
    ME_rf3   <- acc_rf3[1, "ME"]
    MPE_rf3  <- acc_rf3[1, "MPE"]
    MAPE_rf3 <- acc_rf3[1, "MAPE"]

    #============================================
    # COVERAGE
    #============================================

    coverage_rf3 <- mean(
      actual1 >= lower_rf3 &
      actual1 <= upper_rf3
    )

    #============================================
    # WIDTH
    #============================================

    width_rf3 <- mean(upper_rf3 - lower_rf3)

    #============================================
    # STORE SPLIT
    #============================================

    split_rf3 <- data.frame(
      Actual    = actual1,
      Predicted = pred_rf3,
      Lower_PI  = lower_rf3,
      Upper_PI  = upper_rf3
    )

    assign(paste0("RF3_SPLIT_", i), split_rf3)

#==============================================
# STORE RESULTS
#============================================

    results_rf3 <- rbind(
      results_rf3,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        RMSE        = RMSE_rf3,
        MAE         = MAE_rf3,
        ME          = ME_rf3,
        MPE         = MPE_rf3,
        MAPE        = MAPE_rf3,
        Coverage    = coverage_rf3,
        Width       = width_rf3
      )
    )

    print(results_rf3[nrow(results_rf3), ])
    cat("Replication", i, "completed\n")

  }, error = function(e){
    cat("Replication", i, "failed :", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

#================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
```
