```{r}
#================================================

summary_rf3 <- data.frame(
  Model         = "Random Forest",
  Split         = "90%",
  Mean_RMSE     = mean(results_rf3$RMSE,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MAE      = mean(results_rf3$MAE,      na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_ME       = mean(results_rf3$ME,       na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MPE      = mean(results_rf3$MPE,      na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_MAPE     = mean(results_rf3$MAPE,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_rf3$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Width    = mean(results_rf3$Width,    na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_rf3)

```

#GRADIENT-BOOSTING

```{r}
#========================================================
# XGBOOST
# QUANTILE RESIDUAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("XGB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_1 <- datak[traina, ]

test_1 <- datak[-traina, ]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X_train1 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_1
)

y_train1 <- train_1$eggs

X_test1 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_1
)

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train1),

  colnames(X_test1)
)

if(length(missing_cols) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols){

X_test1 <- cbind(

  X_test1,

  rep(0,nrow(X_test1))
)

colnames(X_test1)[ncol(X_test1)] <- col

}
}

extra_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test1),

  colnames(X_train1)
)

if(length(extra_cols) > 0){

X_test1 <- X_test1[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test1) %in% extra_cols),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

X_test1 <- X_test1[
  ,
  colnames(X_train1),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# FIT XGBOOST
#====================================================

xgb_model1 <- xgboost(

  x = X_train1,

  y = y_train1,

  objective = "count:poisson",

  nrounds = 50,

  eta = 0.1,

  max_depth = 4,

  verbosity = 0
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pred_xgb1 <- predict(

  xgb_model1,

  X_test1
)

pred_xgb1 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_xgb1
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual1,

  pred_xgb1
)

actual1 <- actual1[keep]

pred_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1[keep]

if(length(actual1) < 2) next

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILE PI
#====================================================

resid_xgb1 <- actual1 - pred_xgb1

lower_resid <- quantile(

  resid_xgb1,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid <- quantile(

  resid_xgb1,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1 +

  lower_resid

upper_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1 +

  upper_resid

lower_xgb1 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_xgb1
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_xgb1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_xgb1 &

  actual1 <= upper_xgb1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_xgb1 <- mean(

  upper_xgb1 -

  lower_xgb1
)

#====================================================
# ACCURACY
#====================================================

acc_xgb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_xgb1,

  actual1
)

RMSE_xgb1 <- acc_xgb1[1,"RMSE"]

MAE_xgb1 <- acc_xgb1[1,"MAE"]

ME_xgb1 <- acc_xgb1[1,"ME"]

MPE_xgb1 <- acc_xgb1[1,"MPE"]

MAPE_xgb1 <- acc_xgb1[1,"MAPE"]

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_xgb1 <- rbind(

  results_xgb1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_xgb1,

    MAE = MAE_xgb1,

    ME = ME_xgb1,

    MPE = MPE_xgb1,

    MAPE = MAPE_xgb1,

    Coverage = coverage_xgb1,

    Width = width_xgb1
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_xgb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "XGBoost",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_xgb1$RMSE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_xgb1$MAE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_xgb1$ME,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_xgb1$MPE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_xgb1$MAPE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb1$Coverage,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_xgb1$Width,na.rm=TRUE)
)

summary_xgb1
```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# XGBOOST
# QUANTILE RESIDUAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("XGB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_2 <- datak[trainb, ]

test_2 <- datak[-trainb, ]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X_train2 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_2
)

y_train2 <- train_2$eggs

X_test2 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_2
)

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train2),

  colnames(X_test2)
)

if(length(missing_cols) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols){

X_test2 <- cbind(

  X_test2,

  rep(0,nrow(X_test2))
)

colnames(X_test2)[ncol(X_test2)] <- col

}
}

extra_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test2),

  colnames(X_train2)
)

if(length(extra_cols) > 0){

X_test2 <- X_test2[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test2) %in% extra_cols),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

X_test2 <- X_test2[
  ,
  colnames(X_train2),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# FIT XGBOOST
#====================================================

xgb_model2 <- xgboost(

  x = X_train2,

  y = y_train2,

  objective = "count:poisson",

  nrounds = 50,

  eta = 0.1,

  max_depth = 4,

  verbosity = 0
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pred_xgb2 <- predict(

  xgb_model2,

  X_test2
)

pred_xgb2 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_xgb2
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual2,

  pred_xgb2
)

actual2 <- actual2[keep]

pred_xgb2 <- pred_xgb2[keep]

if(length(actual2) < 2) next

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILE PI
#====================================================

resid_xgb2 <- actual2 - pred_xgb2

lower_resid <- quantile(

  resid_xgb2,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid <- quantile(

  resid_xgb2,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_xgb2 <- pred_xgb2 +

  lower_resid

upper_xgb2 <- pred_xgb2 +

  upper_resid

lower_xgb2 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_xgb2
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_xgb2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_xgb2 &

  actual2 <= upper_xgb2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_xgb2 <- mean(

  upper_xgb2 -

  lower_xgb2
)

#====================================================
# ACCURACY
#====================================================

acc_xgb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_xgb2,

  actual2
)

RMSE_xgb2 <- acc_xgb2[1,"RMSE"]

MAE_xgb2 <- acc_xgb2[1,"MAE"]

ME_xgb2 <- acc_xgb2[1,"ME"]

MPE_xgb2 <- acc_xgb2[1,"MPE"]

MAPE_xgb2 <- acc_xgb2[1,"MAPE"]

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_xgb2 <- rbind(

  results_xgb2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_xgb2,

    MAE = MAE_xgb2,

    ME = ME_xgb2,

    MPE = MPE_xgb2,

    MAPE = MAPE_xgb2,

    Coverage = coverage_xgb2,

    Width = width_xgb2
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_xgb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "XGBoost",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_xgb2$RMSE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_xgb2$MAE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_xgb2$ME,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_xgb2$MPE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_xgb2$MAPE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb2$Coverage,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_xgb2$Width,na.rm=TRUE)
)

summary_xgb2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# XGBOOST
# QUANTILE RESIDUAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)
library(dplyr)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("XGB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_3 <- datak[trainc, ]

test_3 <- datak[-trainc, ]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# DESIGN MATRICES
#====================================================

X_train3 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_3
)

y_train3 <- train_3$eggs

X_test3 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_3
)

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train3),

  colnames(X_test3)
)

if(length(missing_cols) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols){

X_test3 <- cbind(

  X_test3,

  rep(0,nrow(X_test3))
)

colnames(X_test3)[ncol(X_test3)] <- col

}
}

extra_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test3),

  colnames(X_train3)
)

if(length(extra_cols) > 0){

X_test3 <- X_test3[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test3) %in% extra_cols),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

X_test3 <- X_test3[
  ,
  colnames(X_train3),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# FIT XGBOOST
#====================================================

xgb_model3 <- xgboost(

  x = X_train3,

  y = y_train3,

  objective = "count:poisson",

  nrounds = 50,

  eta = 0.1,

  max_depth = 4,

  verbosity = 0
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pred_xgb3 <- predict(

  xgb_model3,

  X_test3
)

pred_xgb3 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_xgb3
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual3,

  pred_xgb3
)

actual3 <- actual3[keep]

pred_xgb3 <- pred_xgb3[keep]

if(length(actual3) < 2) next

#====================================================
# RESIDUAL QUANTILE PI
#====================================================

resid_xgb3 <- actual3 - pred_xgb3

lower_resid <- quantile(

  resid_xgb3,

  0.025,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

upper_resid <- quantile(

  resid_xgb3,

  0.975,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

lower_xgb3 <- pred_xgb3 +

  lower_resid

upper_xgb3 <- pred_xgb3 +

  upper_resid

lower_xgb3 <- pmax(
  0,
  lower_xgb3
)

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_xgb3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_xgb3 &

  actual3 <= upper_xgb3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_xgb3 <- mean(

  upper_xgb3 -

  lower_xgb3
)

#====================================================
# ACCURACY
#====================================================

acc_xgb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_xgb3,

  actual3
)

RMSE_xgb3 <- acc_xgb3[1,"RMSE"]

MAE_xgb3 <- acc_xgb3[1,"MAE"]

ME_xgb3 <- acc_xgb3[1,"ME"]

MPE_xgb3 <- acc_xgb3[1,"MPE"]

MAPE_xgb3 <- acc_xgb3[1,"MAPE"]

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_xgb3 <- rbind(

  results_xgb3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_xgb3,

    MAE = MAE_xgb3,

    ME = ME_xgb3,

    MPE = MPE_xgb3,

    MAPE = MAPE_xgb3,

    Coverage = coverage_xgb3,

    Width = width_xgb3
  )
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED :",
  e$message,
  "\n"
)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_xgb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "XGBoost",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_xgb3$RMSE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_xgb3$MAE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_xgb3$ME,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_xgb3$MPE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_xgb3$MAPE,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb3$Coverage,na.rm=TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_xgb3$Width,na.rm=TRUE)
)

summary_xgb3
```

#LIGHTGBM
```{r}
#========================================================
# LIGHTGBM
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# FULLY FIXED
#========================================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_lgb1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("LGB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE NA
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# TRAIN MATRIX
#====================================================

X_train1 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_1
)

X_train1 <- as.matrix(
  X_train1
)

storage.mode(X_train1) <- "double"

y_train1 <- as.numeric(
  train_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test1 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_1
)

X_test1 <- as.matrix(
  X_test1
)

storage.mode(X_test1) <- "double"

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train1),

  colnames(X_test1)
)

if(length(missing_cols) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols){

X_test1 <- cbind(

  X_test1,

  rep(
    0,
    nrow(X_test1)
  )
)

colnames(X_test1)[
  ncol(X_test1)
] <- col
}
}

extra_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test1),

  colnames(X_train1)
)

if(length(extra_cols) > 0){

X_test1 <- X_test1[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test1) %in% extra_cols),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

X_test1 <- X_test1[
  ,
  colnames(X_train1),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# LIGHTGBM DATA
#====================================================

dtrain <- lgb.Dataset(

  data = X_train1,

  label = y_train1
)

#====================================================
# MODEL
#====================================================

model_lgb1 <- lightgbm(

  data = dtrain,

  objective = "poisson",

  nrounds = 100,

)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION
#====================================================

pred_lgb1 <- predict(

  model_lgb1,

  X_test1
)

pred_lgb1 <- as.numeric(
  pred_lgb1
)

pred_lgb1 <- round(
  pred_lgb1
)

pred_lgb1 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_lgb1
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_lgb1 <- abs(

  actual1 -

  pred_lgb1
)

#====================================================
# QUANTILE
#====================================================

qhat_lgb1 <- quantile(

  resid_lgb1,

  0.95,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_lgb1 <- pred_lgb1 -

  qhat_lgb1

upper_lgb1 <- pred_lgb1 +

  qhat_lgb1

lower_lgb1 <- round(
  pmax(
    0,
    lower_lgb1
  )
)

upper_lgb1 <- round(
  upper_lgb1
)

#====================================================
# ACCURACY MEASURES
#====================================================

acc_lgb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_lgb1,

  actual1
)

RMSE_lgb1 <- acc_lgb1[1, "RMSE"]

MAE_lgb1 <- acc_lgb1[1, "MAE"]

ME_lgb1 <- acc_lgb1[1, "ME"]

MPE_lgb1 <- acc_lgb1[1, "MPE"]

MAPE_lgb1 <- acc_lgb1[1, "MAPE"]

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_lgb1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_lgb1 &

  actual1 <= upper_lgb1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_lgb1 <- mean(

  upper_lgb1 -

  lower_lgb1
)

#====================================================
# STORE
#====================================================

results_lgb1 <- rbind(

  results_lgb1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_lgb1,

    MAE = MAE_lgb1,

    ME = ME_lgb1,

    MPE = MPE_lgb1,

    MAPE = MAPE_lgb1,

    Coverage = coverage_lgb1,

    Width = width_lgb1
  )
)

print(
  results_lgb1[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

#====================================================
# ERROR
#====================================================

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED\n"
)

print(
  e$message
)

})
}

#========================================================
# CHECK
#========================================================

cat(
  "\nCompleted Replications:",
  nrow(results_lgb1),
  "\n"
)

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_lgb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "LightGBM",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_lgb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_lgb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_lgb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_lgb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_lgb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_lgb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_lgb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_lgb1

```
#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# LIGHTGBM
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# FULLY FIXED
#========================================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_lgb2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("LGB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

trainb <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_2 <- datak[
  trainb,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -trainb,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE NA
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# TRAIN MATRIX
#====================================================

X_train2 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_2
)

X_train2 <- as.matrix(
  X_train2
)

storage.mode(X_train2) <- "double"

y_train2 <- as.numeric(
  train_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test2 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_2
)

X_test2 <- as.matrix(
  X_test2
)

storage.mode(X_test2) <- "double"

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train2),

  colnames(X_test2)
)

if(length(missing_cols) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols){

X_test2 <- cbind(

  X_test2,

  rep(
    0,
    nrow(X_test2)
  )
)

colnames(X_test2)[
  ncol(X_test2)
] <- col
}
}

extra_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test2),

  colnames(X_train2)
)

if(length(extra_cols) > 0){

X_test2 <- X_test2[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test2) %in% extra_cols),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

X_test2 <- X_test2[
  ,
  colnames(X_train2),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# LIGHTGBM DATA
#====================================================

dtrain <- lgb.Dataset(

  data = X_train2,

  label = y_train2
)

#====================================================
# MODEL
#====================================================

model_lgb2 <- lightgbm(

  data = dtrain,

  objective = "poisson",

  nrounds = 100,

)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION
#====================================================

pred_lgb2 <- predict(

  model_lgb2,

  X_test2
)

pred_lgb2 <- as.numeric(
  pred_lgb2
)

pred_lgb2 <- round(
  pred_lgb2
)

pred_lgb2 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_lgb2
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_lgb2 <- abs(

  actual2 -

  pred_lgb2
)

#====================================================
# QUANTILE
#====================================================

qhat_lgb2 <- quantile(

  resid_lgb2,

  0.95,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_lgb2 <- pred_lgb2 -

  qhat_lgb2

upper_lgb2 <- pred_lgb2 +

  qhat_lgb2

lower_lgb2 <- round(
  pmax(
    0,
    lower_lgb2
  )
)

upper_lgb2 <- round(
  upper_lgb2
)

#====================================================
# ACCURACY MEASURES
#====================================================

acc_lgb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_lgb2,

  actual2
)

RMSE_lgb2 <- acc_lgb2[1, "RMSE"]

MAE_lgb2 <- acc_lgb2[1, "MAE"]

ME_lgb2 <- acc_lgb2[1, "ME"]

MPE_lgb2 <- acc_lgb2[1, "MPE"]

MAPE_lgb2 <- acc_lgb2[1, "MAPE"]

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_lgb2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_lgb2 &

  actual2 <= upper_lgb2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_lgb2 <- mean(

  upper_lgb2 -

  lower_lgb2
)

#====================================================
# STORE
#====================================================

results_lgb2 <- rbind(

  results_lgb2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_lgb2,

    MAE = MAE_lgb2,

    ME = ME_lgb2,

    MPE = MPE_lgb2,

    MAPE = MAPE_lgb2,

    Coverage = coverage_lgb2,

    Width = width_lgb2
  )
)

print(
  results_lgb2[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED\n"
)

print(
  e$message
)

})
}

#========================================================
# CHECK
#========================================================

cat(
  "\nCompleted Replications:",
  nrow(results_lgb2),
  "\n"
)

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_lgb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "LightGBM",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_lgb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_lgb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_lgb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_lgb2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_lgb2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_lgb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_lgb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_lgb2
```


#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# LIGHTGBM
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# FULLY FIXED
#========================================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_lgb3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("LGB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

trainc <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_3 <- datak[
  trainc,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -trainc,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE NA
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# TRAIN MATRIX
#====================================================

X_train3 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_3
)

X_train3 <- as.matrix(
  X_train3
)

storage.mode(X_train3) <- "double"

y_train3 <- as.numeric(
  train_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test3 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_3
)

X_test3 <- as.matrix(
  X_test3
)

storage.mode(X_test3) <- "double"

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train3),

  colnames(X_test3)
)

if(length(missing_cols) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols){

X_test3 <- cbind(

  X_test3,

  rep(
    0,
    nrow(X_test3)
  )
)

colnames(X_test3)[
  ncol(X_test3)
] <- col
}
}

extra_cols <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test3),

  colnames(X_train3)
)

if(length(extra_cols) > 0){

X_test3 <- X_test3[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test3) %in% extra_cols),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

X_test3 <- X_test3[
  ,
  colnames(X_train3),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# LIGHTGBM DATA
#====================================================

dtrain <- lgb.Dataset(

  data = X_train3,

  label = y_train3
)

#====================================================
# MODEL
#====================================================

model_lgb3 <- lightgbm(

  data = dtrain,

  objective = "poisson",

  nrounds = 100,

)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION
#====================================================

pred_lgb3 <- predict(

  model_lgb3,

  X_test3
)

pred_lgb3 <- as.numeric(
  pred_lgb3
)

pred_lgb3 <- round(
  pred_lgb3
)

pred_lgb3 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_lgb3
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_lgb3 <- abs(

  actual3 -

  pred_lgb3
)

#====================================================
# QUANTILE
#====================================================

qhat_lgb3 <- quantile(

  resid_lgb3,

  0.95,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PI
#====================================================

lower_lgb3 <- pred_lgb3 -

  qhat_lgb3

upper_lgb3 <- pred_lgb3 +

  qhat_lgb3

lower_lgb3 <- round(
  pmax(
    0,
    lower_lgb3
  )
)

upper_lgb3 <- round(
  upper_lgb3
)

#====================================================
# ACCURACY MEASURES
#====================================================

acc_lgb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_lgb3,

  actual3
)

RMSE_lgb3 <- acc_lgb3[1, "RMSE"]

MAE_lgb3 <- acc_lgb3[1, "MAE"]

ME_lgb3 <- acc_lgb3[1, "ME"]

MPE_lgb3 <- acc_lgb3[1, "MPE"]

MAPE_lgb3 <- acc_lgb3[1, "MAPE"]

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_lgb3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_lgb3 &

  actual3 <= upper_lgb3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_lgb3 <- mean(

  upper_lgb3 -

  lower_lgb3
)

#====================================================
# STORE
#====================================================

results_lgb3 <- rbind(

  results_lgb3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_lgb3,

    MAE = MAE_lgb3,

    ME = ME_lgb3,

    MPE = MPE_lgb3,

    MAPE = MAPE_lgb3,

    Coverage = coverage_lgb3,

    Width = width_lgb3
  )
)

print(
  results_lgb3[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED\n"
)

print(
  e$message
)

})
}

#========================================================
# CHECK
#========================================================

cat(
  "\nCompleted Replications:",
  nrow(results_lgb3),
  "\n"
)

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_lgb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "LightGBM",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_lgb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_lgb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_lgb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_lgb3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_lgb3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_lgb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_lgb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_lgb3
```












##GLMNET
```{r}
#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# COMPLETELY FIXED VERSION
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LIBRARY
#========================================================

library(glmnet)
library(Matrix)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_glmnet1 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("GLMNET1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_1 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_1 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================================
# TRAIN MATRIX
#====================================================

X_train1 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_1
)

y_train1 <- train_1$eggs

#====================================================
# TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test1 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_1
)

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols_test <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train1),

  colnames(X_test1)
)

if(length(missing_cols_test) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols_test){

  X_test1 <- cbind(

    X_test1,

    rep(
      0,
      nrow(X_test1)
    )
  )

  colnames(X_test1)[
    ncol(X_test1)
  ] <- col
}
}

#====================================================
# REMOVE EXTRA TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

extra_cols_test <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test1),

  colnames(X_train1)
)

if(length(extra_cols_test) > 0){

X_test1 <- X_test1[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test1) %in% extra_cols_test),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

#====================================================
# ORDER TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test1 <- X_test1[
  ,
  colnames(X_train1),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# FIT MODEL
#====================================================

model_glmnet1 <- cv.glmnet(

  x = X_train1,

  y = y_train1,

  family = "poisson",

  alpha = 1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pred_glmnet1 <- predict(

  model_glmnet1,

  newx = X_test1,

  s = "lambda.min",

  type = "response"
)

pred_glmnet1 <- as.numeric(
  pred_glmnet1
)

pred_glmnet1 <- round(
  pred_glmnet1
)

pred_glmnet1 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_glmnet1
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual1 <- as.numeric(
  test_1$eggs
)

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_glmnet1 <- abs(

  actual1 -

  pred_glmnet1
)

resid_glmnet1 <- resid_glmnet1[
  is.finite(resid_glmnet1)
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL QUANTILE
#====================================================

qhat_glmnet1 <- quantile(

  resid_glmnet1,

  0.95,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVAL
#====================================================

lower_glmnet1 <- pred_glmnet1 -

  qhat_glmnet1

upper_glmnet1 <- pred_glmnet1 +

  qhat_glmnet1

#====================================================
# NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
#====================================================

lower_glmnet1 <- round(
  pmax(
    0,
    lower_glmnet1
  )
)

upper_glmnet1 <- round(
  upper_glmnet1
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual1,

  pred_glmnet1,

  lower_glmnet1,

  upper_glmnet1
)

actual1       <- actual1[keep]
pred_glmnet1  <- pred_glmnet1[keep]
lower_glmnet1 <- lower_glmnet1[keep]
upper_glmnet1 <- upper_glmnet1[keep]

if(length(actual1) < 2) next

#====================================================
# ACCURACY MEASURES
#====================================================

acc_glmnet1 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_glmnet1,

  actual1
)

RMSE_glmnet1 <- acc_glmnet1[1, "RMSE"]

MAE_glmnet1  <- acc_glmnet1[1, "MAE"]

ME_glmnet1   <- acc_glmnet1[1, "ME"]

MPE_glmnet1  <- acc_glmnet1[1, "MPE"]

MAPE_glmnet1 <- acc_glmnet1[1, "MAPE"]

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_glmnet1 <- mean(

  actual1 >= lower_glmnet1 &

  actual1 <= upper_glmnet1
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_glmnet1 <- mean(

  upper_glmnet1 -

  lower_glmnet1
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_glmnet1 <- rbind(

  results_glmnet1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_glmnet1,

    MAE  = MAE_glmnet1,

    ME   = ME_glmnet1,

    MPE  = MPE_glmnet1,

    MAPE = MAPE_glmnet1,

    Coverage = coverage_glmnet1,

    Width = width_glmnet1
  )
)

#====================================================
# PRINT ITERATION RESULT
#====================================================

print(
  results_glmnet1[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed successfully\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED\n"
)

print(e)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_glmnet1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GLMNET",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_glmnet1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_glmnet1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_glmnet1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_glmnet1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_glmnet1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_glmnet1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_glmnet1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_glmnet1
```
#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# COMPLETELY FIXED VERSION
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LIBRARY
#========================================================

library(glmnet)
library(Matrix)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_glmnet2 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("GLMNET2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_2 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_2 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================================
# TRAIN MATRIX
#====================================================

X_train2 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_2
)

y_train2 <- train_2$eggs

#====================================================
# TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test2 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_2
)

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols_test <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train2),

  colnames(X_test2)
)

if(length(missing_cols_test) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols_test){

  X_test2 <- cbind(

    X_test2,

    rep(
      0,
      nrow(X_test2)
    )
  )

  colnames(X_test2)[
    ncol(X_test2)
  ] <- col
}
}

#====================================================
# REMOVE EXTRA TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

extra_cols_test <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test2),

  colnames(X_train2)
)

if(length(extra_cols_test) > 0){

X_test2 <- X_test2[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test2) %in% extra_cols_test),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

#====================================================
# ORDER TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test2 <- X_test2[
  ,
  colnames(X_train2),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# FIT MODEL
#====================================================

model_glmnet2 <- cv.glmnet(

  x = X_train2,

  y = y_train2,

  family = "poisson",

  alpha = 1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pred_glmnet2 <- predict(

  model_glmnet2,

  newx = X_test2,

  s = "lambda.min",

  type = "response"
)

pred_glmnet2 <- as.numeric(
  pred_glmnet2
)

pred_glmnet2 <- round(
  pred_glmnet2
)

pred_glmnet2 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_glmnet2
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual2 <- as.numeric(
  test_2$eggs
)

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_glmnet2 <- abs(

  actual2 -

  pred_glmnet2
)

resid_glmnet2 <- resid_glmnet2[
  is.finite(resid_glmnet2)
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL QUANTILE
#====================================================

qhat_glmnet2 <- quantile(

  resid_glmnet2,

  0.95,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVAL
#====================================================

lower_glmnet2 <- pred_glmnet2 -

  qhat_glmnet2

upper_glmnet2 <- pred_glmnet2 +

  qhat_glmnet2

#====================================================
# NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
#====================================================

lower_glmnet2 <- round(
  pmax(
    0,
    lower_glmnet2
  )
)

upper_glmnet2 <- round(
  upper_glmnet2
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual2,

  pred_glmnet2,

  lower_glmnet2,

  upper_glmnet2
)

actual2       <- actual2[keep]
pred_glmnet2  <- pred_glmnet2[keep]
lower_glmnet2 <- lower_glmnet2[keep]
upper_glmnet2 <- upper_glmnet2[keep]

if(length(actual2) < 2) next

#====================================================
# ACCURACY MEASURES
#====================================================

acc_glmnet2 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_glmnet2,

  actual2
)

RMSE_glmnet2 <- acc_glmnet2[1, "RMSE"]

MAE_glmnet2  <- acc_glmnet2[1, "MAE"]

ME_glmnet2   <- acc_glmnet2[1, "ME"]

MPE_glmnet2  <- acc_glmnet2[1, "MPE"]

MAPE_glmnet2 <- acc_glmnet2[1, "MAPE"]

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_glmnet2 <- mean(

  actual2 >= lower_glmnet2 &

  actual2 <= upper_glmnet2
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_glmnet2 <- mean(

  upper_glmnet2 -

  lower_glmnet2
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_glmnet2 <- rbind(

  results_glmnet2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_glmnet2,

    MAE  = MAE_glmnet2,

    ME   = ME_glmnet2,

    MPE  = MPE_glmnet2,

    MAPE = MAPE_glmnet2,

    Coverage = coverage_glmnet2,

    Width = width_glmnet2
  )
)

#====================================================
# PRINT ITERATION RESULT
#====================================================

print(
  results_glmnet2[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed successfully\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED\n"
)

print(e)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_glmnet2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GLMNET",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_glmnet2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_glmnet2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_glmnet2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_glmnet2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_glmnet2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_glmnet2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_glmnet2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_glmnet2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# COMPLETELY FIXED VERSION
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LIBRARY
#========================================================

library(glmnet)
library(Matrix)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_glmnet3 <- data.frame(

  Replication = numeric(),

  RMSE = numeric(),

  MAE = numeric(),

  ME = numeric(),

  MPE = numeric(),

  MAPE = numeric(),

  Coverage = numeric(),

  Width = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# SETTINGS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("GLMNET3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
cat("====================================\n")

tryCatch({

#====================================================
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
#====================================================

set.seed(1000 + i)

traina <- sample(

  1:nrow(datak),

  size = floor(
    0.70 * nrow(datak)
  )
)

train_3 <- datak[
  traina,
]

test_3 <- datak[
  -traina,
]

#====================================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================================
# TRAIN MATRIX
#====================================================

X_train3 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = train_3
)

y_train3 <- train_3$eggs

#====================================================
# TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test3 <- model.matrix(

  eggs ~ . - 1,

  data = test_3
)

#====================================================
# MATCH TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

missing_cols_test <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_train3),

  colnames(X_test3)
)

if(length(missing_cols_test) > 0){

for(col in missing_cols_test){

  X_test3 <- cbind(

    X_test3,

    rep(
      0,
      nrow(X_test3)
    )
  )

  colnames(X_test3)[
    ncol(X_test3)
  ] <- col
}
}

#====================================================
# REMOVE EXTRA TEST COLUMNS
#====================================================

extra_cols_test <- setdiff(

  colnames(X_test3),

  colnames(X_train3)
)

if(length(extra_cols_test) > 0){

X_test3 <- X_test3[
  ,
  !(colnames(X_test3) %in% extra_cols_test),
  drop = FALSE
]
}

#====================================================
# ORDER TEST MATRIX
#====================================================

X_test3 <- X_test3[
  ,
  colnames(X_train3),
  drop = FALSE
]

#====================================================
# FIT MODEL
#====================================================

model_glmnet3 <- cv.glmnet(

  x = X_train3,

  y = y_train3,

  family = "poisson",

  alpha = 1
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTIONS
#====================================================

pred_glmnet3 <- predict(

  model_glmnet3,

  newx = X_test3,

  s = "lambda.min",

  type = "response"
)

pred_glmnet3 <- as.numeric(
  pred_glmnet3
)

pred_glmnet3 <- round(
  pred_glmnet3
)

pred_glmnet3 <- pmax(
  0,
  pred_glmnet3
)

#====================================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================================

actual3 <- as.numeric(
  test_3$eggs
)

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
#====================================================

resid_glmnet3 <- abs(

  actual3 -

  pred_glmnet3
)

resid_glmnet3 <- resid_glmnet3[
  is.finite(resid_glmnet3)
]

#====================================================
# CONFORMAL QUANTILE
#====================================================

qhat_glmnet3 <- quantile(

  resid_glmnet3,

  0.95,

  na.rm = TRUE
)

#====================================================
# PREDICTION INTERVAL
#====================================================

lower_glmnet3 <- pred_glmnet3 -

  qhat_glmnet3

upper_glmnet3 <- pred_glmnet3 +

  qhat_glmnet3

#====================================================
# NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
#====================================================

lower_glmnet3 <- round(
  pmax(
    0,
    lower_glmnet3
  )
)

upper_glmnet3 <- round(
  upper_glmnet3
)

#====================================================
# VALID OBSERVATIONS
#====================================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual3,

  pred_glmnet3,

  lower_glmnet3,

  upper_glmnet3
)

actual3       <- actual3[keep]
pred_glmnet3  <- pred_glmnet3[keep]
lower_glmnet3 <- lower_glmnet3[keep]
upper_glmnet3 <- upper_glmnet3[keep]

if(length(actual3) < 2) next

#====================================================
# ACCURACY MEASURES
#====================================================

acc_glmnet3 <- forecast::accuracy(

  pred_glmnet3,

  actual3
)

RMSE_glmnet3 <- acc_glmnet3[1, "RMSE"]

MAE_glmnet3  <- acc_glmnet3[1, "MAE"]

ME_glmnet3   <- acc_glmnet3[1, "ME"]

MPE_glmnet3  <- acc_glmnet3[1, "MPE"]

MAPE_glmnet3 <- acc_glmnet3[1, "MAPE"]

#====================================================
# COVERAGE
#====================================================

coverage_glmnet3 <- mean(

  actual3 >= lower_glmnet3 &

  actual3 <= upper_glmnet3
)

#====================================================
# WIDTH
#====================================================

width_glmnet3 <- mean(

  upper_glmnet3 -

  lower_glmnet3
)

#====================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#====================================================

results_glmnet3 <- rbind(

  results_glmnet3,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    RMSE = RMSE_glmnet3,

    MAE  = MAE_glmnet3,

    ME   = ME_glmnet3,

    MPE  = MPE_glmnet3,

    MAPE = MAPE_glmnet3,

    Coverage = coverage_glmnet3,

    Width = width_glmnet3
  )
)

#====================================================
# PRINT ITERATION RESULT
#====================================================

print(
  results_glmnet3[i, ]
)

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "completed successfully\n"
)

}, error = function(e){

cat(
  "Replication",
  i,
  "FAILED\n"
)

print(e)

})
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_glmnet3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GLMNET",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_glmnet3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_glmnet3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_glmnet3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_glmnet3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_glmnet3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_glmnet3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_glmnet3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_glmnet3
```

#NEURAL-NETWORK
```{r}

#========================================================
# NEURAL NETWORK USING nnet
# CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(nnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nn1 <- data.frame(
  Replication = numeric(),
  RMSE        = numeric(),
  MAE         = numeric(),
  MAPE        = numeric(),
  MPE         = numeric(),
  ME          = numeric(),
  Coverage    = numeric(),
  Width       = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NN1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  tryCatch({

    #====================================================
    # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
    #====================================================

    set.seed(1000 + i)

    traina <- sample(
      1:nrow(datak),
      size    = floor(0.70 * nrow(datak)),
      replace = FALSE
    )

    train_1 <- datak[ traina, ]
    test_1  <- datak[-traina, ]

    #====================================================
    # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
    #====================================================

    train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
    test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

    if(nrow(train_1) < 10 || nrow(test_1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: insufficient data\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # MATCH FACTOR LEVELS TO FULL DATASET
    #====================================================

    factor_vars <- names(which(sapply(datak, is.factor)))

    for(v in factor_vars){
      all_levels <- levels(factor(datak[[v]]))
      train_1[[v]] <- factor(train_1[[v]], levels = all_levels)
      test_1[[v]]  <- factor(test_1[[v]],  levels = all_levels)
    }

    #====================================================
    # NORMALIZE INPUTS FOR nnet
    #====================================================

    num_vars <- names(which(sapply(train_1, is.numeric)))
    num_vars <- setdiff(num_vars, "eggs")

    train_scaled <- train_1
    test_scaled  <- test_1

    for(v in num_vars){
      col_mean <- mean(train_1[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
      col_sd   <- sd(train_1[[v]],   na.rm = TRUE)
      if(col_sd > 0){
        train_scaled[[v]] <- (train_1[[v]] - col_mean) / col_sd
        test_scaled[[v]]  <- (test_1[[v]]  - col_mean) / col_sd
      }
    }

    #====================================================
    # FIT NEURAL NETWORK
    #====================================================

    nn_model1 <- nnet(
      eggs ~ .,
      data   = train_scaled,
      size   = 5,
      linout = TRUE,
      trace  = FALSE,
      maxit  = 500,
      decay  = 0.01        # regularization to help convergence
    )

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTIONS
    #====================================================

    pred_nn1 <- as.numeric(predict(nn_model1, newdata = test_scaled))
    pred_nn1 <- pmax(0, round(pred_nn1))

    #====================================================
    # ACTUAL VALUES
    #====================================================

    actual1 <- as.numeric(test_1$eggs)

    #====================================================
    # VALID OBSERVATIONS
    #====================================================

    keep     <- complete.cases(actual1, pred_nn1)
    actual1  <- actual1[keep]
    pred_nn1 <- pred_nn1[keep]

    if(length(actual1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: too few valid observations\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # ACCURACY MEASURES
    #====================================================

    acc_nn1  <- forecast::accuracy(pred_nn1, actual1)

    RMSE_nn1 <- acc_nn1[1, "RMSE"]
    MAE_nn1  <- acc_nn1[1, "MAE"]
    MAPE_nn1 <- acc_nn1[1, "MAPE"]
    MPE_nn1  <- acc_nn1[1, "MPE"]
    ME_nn1   <- mean(actual1 - pred_nn1)

    #====================================================
    # CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
    # Uses calibration residuals from training set
    #====================================================

    pred_train <- as.numeric(predict(nn_model1, newdata = train_scaled))
    pred_train <- pmax(0, round(pred_train))
    actual_train <- as.numeric(train_1$eggs)

    calib_resid <- abs(actual_train - pred_train)
    calib_resid <- calib_resid[is.finite(calib_resid)]

    qhat_nn1 <- quantile(calib_resid, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTION INTERVALS
    #====================================================

    lower_nn1 <- pmax(0, round(pred_nn1 - qhat_nn1))
    upper_nn1 <- round(pred_nn1 + qhat_nn1)

    #====================================================
    # COVERAGE
    #====================================================

    coverage_nn1 <- mean(
      actual1 >= lower_nn1 &
      actual1 <= upper_nn1
    )

    #====================================================
    # WIDTH
    #====================================================

    width_nn1 <- mean(upper_nn1 - lower_nn1)

    #====================================================
    # STORE RESULTS
    #====================================================

    results_nn1 <- rbind(
      results_nn1,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        RMSE        = RMSE_nn1,
        MAE         = MAE_nn1,
        MAPE        = MAPE_nn1,
        MPE         = MPE_nn1,
        ME          = ME_nn1,
        Coverage    = coverage_nn1,
        Width       = width_nn1
      )
    )

    print(tail(results_nn1, 1))
    cat("Replication", i, "completed\n")
    cat("  RMSE:", round(RMSE_nn1, 4),
        "MAE:",   round(MAE_nn1,  4),
        "MAPE:",  round(MAPE_nn1, 4), "\n")

  }, error = function(e){
    cat("Replication", i, "failed :", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_nn1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Neural Network",
  Split = "70%",

  # RMSE
  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_nn1$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_RMSE   = sd(results_nn1$RMSE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_RMSE  = min(results_nn1$RMSE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_RMSE  = max(results_nn1$RMSE,  na.rm = TRUE),

  # MAE
  Mean_MAE  = mean(results_nn1$MAE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MAE    = sd(results_nn1$MAE,    na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_MAE   = min(results_nn1$MAE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_MAE   = max(results_nn1$MAE,   na.rm = TRUE),

  # MAPE
  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_nn1$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MAPE   = sd(results_nn1$MAPE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_MAPE  = min(results_nn1$MAPE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_MAPE  = max(results_nn1$MAPE,  na.rm = TRUE),

  # MPE
  Mean_MPE  = mean(results_nn1$MPE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MPE    = sd(results_nn1$MPE,    na.rm = TRUE),

  # ME
  Mean_ME   = mean(results_nn1$ME,   na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_ME     = sd(results_nn1$ME,     na.rm = TRUE),

  # Coverage
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_nn1$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_Coverage   = sd(results_nn1$Coverage,   na.rm = TRUE),

  # Width
  Mean_Width = mean(results_nn1$Width, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_Width   = sd(results_nn1$Width,   na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_nn1)
```

#80
```{r}

#========================================================
# NEURAL NETWORK USING nnet
# CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(nnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nn2 <- data.frame(
  Replication = numeric(),
  RMSE        = numeric(),
  MAE         = numeric(),
  MAPE        = numeric(),
  MPE         = numeric(),
  ME          = numeric(),
  Coverage    = numeric(),
  Width       = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NN2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  tryCatch({

    #====================================================
    # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
    #====================================================

    set.seed(1000 + i)

    traina <- sample(
      1:nrow(datak),
      size    = floor(0.80 * nrow(datak)),
      replace = FALSE
    )

    train_1 <- datak[ trainb, ]
    test_1  <- datak[-trainb, ]

    #====================================================
    # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
    #====================================================

    train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
    test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

    if(nrow(train_1) < 10 || nrow(test_1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: insufficient data\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # MATCH FACTOR LEVELS TO FULL DATASET
    #====================================================

    factor_vars <- names(which(sapply(datak, is.factor)))

    for(v in factor_vars){
      all_levels   <- levels(factor(datak[[v]]))
      train_1[[v]] <- factor(train_1[[v]], levels = all_levels)
      test_1[[v]]  <- factor(test_1[[v]],  levels = all_levels)
    }

    #====================================================
    # NORMALIZE INPUTS FOR nnet
    #====================================================

    num_vars <- names(which(sapply(train_1, is.numeric)))
    num_vars <- setdiff(num_vars, "eggs")

    train_scaled <- train_1
    test_scaled  <- test_1

    for(v in num_vars){
      col_mean <- mean(train_1[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
      col_sd   <- sd(train_1[[v]],   na.rm = TRUE)
      if(col_sd > 0){
        train_scaled[[v]] <- (train_1[[v]] - col_mean) / col_sd
        test_scaled[[v]]  <- (test_1[[v]]  - col_mean) / col_sd
      }
    }

    #====================================================
    # FIT NEURAL NETWORK
    #====================================================

    nn_model2 <- nnet(
      eggs ~ .,
      data   = train_scaled,
      size   = 5,
      linout = TRUE,
      trace  = FALSE,
      maxit  = 500,
      decay  = 0.01
    )

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTIONS
    #====================================================

    pred_nn2 <- as.numeric(predict(nn_model2, newdata = test_scaled))
    pred_nn2 <- pmax(0, round(pred_nn2))

    #====================================================
    # ACTUAL VALUES
    #====================================================

    actual1 <- as.numeric(test_1$eggs)

    #====================================================
    # VALID OBSERVATIONS
    #====================================================

    keep     <- complete.cases(actual1, pred_nn2)
    actual1  <- actual1[keep]
    pred_nn2 <- pred_nn2[keep]

    if(length(actual1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: too few valid observations\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # ACCURACY MEASURES
    #====================================================

    acc_nn2  <- forecast::accuracy(pred_nn2, actual1)

    RMSE_nn2 <- acc_nn2[1, "RMSE"]
    MAE_nn2  <- acc_nn2[1, "MAE"]
    MAPE_nn2 <- acc_nn2[1, "MAPE"]
    MPE_nn2  <- acc_nn2[1, "MPE"]
    ME_nn2   <- mean(actual1 - pred_nn2)

    #====================================================
    # CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
    #====================================================

    pred_train   <- as.numeric(predict(nn_model2, newdata = train_scaled))
    pred_train   <- pmax(0, round(pred_train))
    actual_train <- as.numeric(train_1$eggs)

    calib_resid  <- abs(actual_train - pred_train)
    calib_resid  <- calib_resid[is.finite(calib_resid)]

    qhat_nn2 <- quantile(calib_resid, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTION INTERVALS
    #====================================================

    lower_nn2 <- pmax(0, round(pred_nn2 - qhat_nn2))
    upper_nn2 <- round(pred_nn2 + qhat_nn2)

    #====================================================
    # COVERAGE
    #====================================================

    coverage_nn2 <- mean(
      actual1 >= lower_nn2 &
      actual1 <= upper_nn2
    )

    #====================================================
    # WIDTH
    #====================================================

    width_nn2 <- mean(upper_nn2 - lower_nn2)

    #====================================================
    # STORE RESULTS
    #====================================================

    results_nn2 <- rbind(
      results_nn2,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        RMSE        = RMSE_nn2,
        MAE         = MAE_nn2,
        MAPE        = MAPE_nn2,
        MPE         = MPE_nn2,
        ME          = ME_nn2,
        Coverage    = coverage_nn2,
        Width       = width_nn2
      )
    )

    print(tail(results_nn2, 1))
    cat("Replication", i, "completed\n")
    cat("  RMSE:", round(RMSE_nn2, 4),
        "MAE:",   round(MAE_nn2,  4),
        "MAPE:",  round(MAPE_nn2, 4), "\n")

  }, error = function(e){
    cat("Replication", i, "failed :", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_nn2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Neural Network",
  Split = "80%",

  # RMSE
  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_nn2$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_RMSE   = sd(results_nn2$RMSE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_RMSE  = min(results_nn2$RMSE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_RMSE  = max(results_nn2$RMSE,  na.rm = TRUE),

  # MAE
  Mean_MAE  = mean(results_nn2$MAE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MAE    = sd(results_nn2$MAE,    na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_MAE   = min(results_nn2$MAE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_MAE   = max(results_nn2$MAE,   na.rm = TRUE),

  # MAPE
  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_nn2$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MAPE   = sd(results_nn2$MAPE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_MAPE  = min(results_nn2$MAPE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_MAPE  = max(results_nn2$MAPE,  na.rm = TRUE),

  # MPE
  Mean_MPE  = mean(results_nn2$MPE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MPE    = sd(results_nn2$MPE,    na.rm = TRUE),

  # ME
  Mean_ME   = mean(results_nn2$ME,   na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_ME     = sd(results_nn2$ME,     na.rm = TRUE),

  # Coverage
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_nn2$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_Coverage   = sd(results_nn2$Coverage,   na.rm = TRUE),

  # Width
  Mean_Width = mean(results_nn2$Width, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_Width   = sd(results_nn2$Width,   na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_nn2)
```
#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# NEURAL NETWORK USING nnet
# CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(nnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nn3 <- data.frame(
  Replication = numeric(),
  RMSE        = numeric(),
  MAE         = numeric(),
  MAPE        = numeric(),
  MPE         = numeric(),
  ME          = numeric(),
  Coverage    = numeric(),
  Width       = numeric()
)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NN3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  tryCatch({

    #====================================================
    # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
    #====================================================

    set.seed(1000 + i)

    traina <- sample(
      1:nrow(datak),
      size    = floor(0.90 * nrow(datak)),
      replace = FALSE
    )

    train_1 <- datak[ trainc, ]
    test_1  <- datak[-trainc, ]

    #====================================================
    # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
    #====================================================

    train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
    test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

    if(nrow(train_1) < 10 || nrow(test_1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: insufficient data\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # MATCH FACTOR LEVELS TO FULL DATASET
    #====================================================

    factor_vars <- names(which(sapply(datak, is.factor)))

    for(v in factor_vars){
      all_levels   <- levels(factor(datak[[v]]))
      train_1[[v]] <- factor(train_1[[v]], levels = all_levels)
      test_1[[v]]  <- factor(test_1[[v]],  levels = all_levels)
    }

    #====================================================
    # NORMALIZE INPUTS FOR nnet
    #====================================================

    num_vars <- names(which(sapply(train_1, is.numeric)))
    num_vars <- setdiff(num_vars, "eggs")

    train_scaled <- train_1
    test_scaled  <- test_1

    for(v in num_vars){
      col_mean <- mean(train_1[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
```
