```{r}
      col_sd   <- sd(train_1[[v]],   na.rm = TRUE)
      if(col_sd > 0){
        train_scaled[[v]] <- (train_1[[v]] - col_mean) / col_sd
        test_scaled[[v]]  <- (test_1[[v]]  - col_mean) / col_sd
      }
    }

    #====================================================
    # FIT NEURAL NETWORK
    #====================================================

    nn_model3 <- nnet(
      eggs ~ .,
      data   = train_scaled,
      size   = 5,
      linout = TRUE,
      trace  = FALSE,
      maxit  = 500,
      decay  = 0.01
    )

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTIONS
    #====================================================

    pred_nn3 <- as.numeric(predict(nn_model3, newdata = test_scaled))
    pred_nn3 <- pmax(0, round(pred_nn3))

    #====================================================
    # ACTUAL VALUES
    #====================================================

    actual1 <- as.numeric(test_1$eggs)

    #====================================================
    # VALID OBSERVATIONS
    #====================================================

    keep     <- complete.cases(actual1, pred_nn3)
    actual1  <- actual1[keep]
    pred_nn3 <- pred_nn3[keep]

    if(length(actual1) < 2){
      cat("Replication", i, "skipped: too few valid observations\n")
      next
    }

    #====================================================
    # ACCURACY MEASURES
    #====================================================

    acc_nn3  <- forecast::accuracy(pred_nn3, actual1)

    RMSE_nn3 <- acc_nn3[1, "RMSE"]
    MAE_nn3  <- acc_nn3[1, "MAE"]
    MAPE_nn3 <- acc_nn3[1, "MAPE"]
    MPE_nn3  <- acc_nn3[1, "MPE"]
    ME_nn3   <- mean(actual1 - pred_nn3)

    #====================================================
    # CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
    #====================================================

    pred_train   <- as.numeric(predict(nn_model3, newdata = train_scaled))
    pred_train   <- pmax(0, round(pred_train))
    actual_train <- as.numeric(train_1$eggs)

    calib_resid  <- abs(actual_train - pred_train)
    calib_resid  <- calib_resid[is.finite(calib_resid)]

    qhat_nn3 <- quantile(calib_resid, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

    #====================================================
    # PREDICTION INTERVALS
    #====================================================

    lower_nn3 <- pmax(0, round(pred_nn3 - qhat_nn3))
    upper_nn3 <- round(pred_nn3 + qhat_nn3)

    #====================================================
    # COVERAGE
    #====================================================

    coverage_nn3 <- mean(
      actual1 >= lower_nn3 &
      actual1 <= upper_nn3
    )

    #====================================================
    # WIDTH
    #====================================================

    width_nn3 <- mean(upper_nn3 - lower_nn3)

    #====================================================
    # STORE RESULTS
    #====================================================

    results_nn3 <- rbind(
      results_nn3,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        RMSE        = RMSE_nn3,
        MAE         = MAE_nn3,
        MAPE        = MAPE_nn3,
        MPE         = MPE_nn3,
        ME          = ME_nn3,
        Coverage    = coverage_nn3,
        Width       = width_nn3
      )
    )

    print(tail(results_nn3, 1))
    cat("Replication", i, "completed\n")
    cat("  RMSE:", round(RMSE_nn3, 4),
        "MAE:",   round(MAE_nn3,  4),
        "MAPE:",  round(MAPE_nn3, 4), "\n")

  }, error = function(e){
    cat("Replication", i, "failed :", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_nn3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Neural Network",
  Split = "90%",

  # RMSE
  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_nn3$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_RMSE   = sd(results_nn3$RMSE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_RMSE  = min(results_nn3$RMSE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_RMSE  = max(results_nn3$RMSE,  na.rm = TRUE),

  # MAE
  Mean_MAE  = mean(results_nn3$MAE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MAE    = sd(results_nn3$MAE,    na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_MAE   = min(results_nn3$MAE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_MAE   = max(results_nn3$MAE,   na.rm = TRUE),

  # MAPE
  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_nn3$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MAPE   = sd(results_nn3$MAPE,   na.rm = TRUE),
  Min_MAPE  = min(results_nn3$MAPE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_MAPE  = max(results_nn3$MAPE,  na.rm = TRUE),

  # MPE
  Mean_MPE  = mean(results_nn3$MPE,  na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_MPE    = sd(results_nn3$MPE,    na.rm = TRUE),

  # ME
  Mean_ME   = mean(results_nn3$ME,   na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_ME     = sd(results_nn3$ME,     na.rm = TRUE),

  # Coverage
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_nn3$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_Coverage   = sd(results_nn3$Coverage,   na.rm = TRUE),

  # Width
  Mean_Width = mean(results_nn3$Width, na.rm = TRUE),
  SD_Width   = sd(results_nn3$Width,   na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_nn3)


```



#ML MODEL COMPARISON
```{r}
#====================================================
# COMPARISON TABLE
# 70:30 SPLIT
#====================================================

compare_70 <- rbind(
data.frame(
Model="Random Forest",
RMSE=summary_rf1$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_rf1$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_rf1$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_rf1$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_rf1$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_rf1$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_rf1$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="XGBoost",
RMSE=summary_xgb1$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_xgb1$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_xgb1$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_xgb1$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_xgb1$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_xgb1$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_xgb1$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="LightGBM",
RMSE=summary_lgb1$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_lgb1$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_lgb1$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_lgb1$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_lgb1$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_lgb1$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_lgb1$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="GLMNET",
RMSE=summary_glmnet1$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_glmnet1$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_glmnet1$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_glmnet1$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_glmnet1$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_glmnet1$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_glmnet1$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="Neural Network",
RMSE=summary_nn1$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_nn1$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_nn1$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_nn1$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_nn1$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_nn1$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_nn1$Mean_Width
)

)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

compare_70$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_70$RMSE)

compare_70$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_70$MAE)

compare_70$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_70$ME))

compare_70$MPE_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_70$MPE),
                            na.last = "keep")

compare_70$MAPE_Rank <- rank(compare_70$MAPE,
                             na.last = "keep")

compare_70$Coverage_Rank <- rank(-compare_70$Coverage)

compare_70$Width_Rank <- rank(compare_70$Width)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_70$Overall_Rank <-

rowSums(

compare_70[,c(
"RMSE_Rank",
"MAE_Rank",
"ME_Rank",
"MPE_Rank",
"MAPE_Rank",
"Coverage_Rank",
"Width_Rank"
)],

na.rm = TRUE
)

compare_70 <-

compare_70[
order(compare_70$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_70) <- NULL

compare_70
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#====================================================
# ROUND VALUES
#====================================================

compare_70_export <- compare_70

compare_70_export$RMSE <- round(compare_70_export$RMSE,4)
compare_70_export$MAE <- round(compare_70_export$MAE,4)
compare_70_export$ME <- round(compare_70_export$ME,4)
compare_70_export$MPE <- round(compare_70_export$MPE,4)
compare_70_export$MAPE <- round(compare_70_export$MAPE,4)
compare_70_export$Coverage <- round(compare_70_export$Coverage,4)
compare_70_export$Width <- round(compare_70_export$Width,4)

#====================================================
# LATEX TABLE
#====================================================

latex_compare_70 <- kable(

  compare_70_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  longtable = FALSE,

  caption = paste(
    "Comparison of Statistical and Machine Learning Models",
    "for the Linnet Dataset under the 70:30 Train--Test Split"
  ),

  label = "tab:linnet70_ml_compare"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 7
)

#====================================================
# EXPORT TO TEX
#====================================================

writeLines(

  as.character(
    latex_compare_70
  ),

  "compare_70_ml_linnet.tex"
)

cat(
"\nLaTeX file exported successfully:\n",
"compare_70_ml_linnet.tex\n"
)
getwd()
```

#80
```{r}
#====================================================
# MODEL COMPARISON TABLE
# 80:20 SPLIT
#====================================================

compare_80 <- rbind(

data.frame(
Model = "Random Forest",
RMSE = summary_rf2$Mean_RMSE,
MAE = summary_rf2$Mean_MAE,
ME = summary_rf2$Mean_ME,
MPE = summary_rf2$Mean_MPE,
MAPE = summary_rf2$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage = summary_rf2$Mean_Coverage,
Width = summary_rf2$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model = "XGBoost",
RMSE = summary_xgb2$Mean_RMSE,
MAE = summary_xgb2$Mean_MAE,
ME = summary_xgb2$Mean_ME,
MPE = summary_xgb2$Mean_MPE,
MAPE = summary_xgb2$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage = summary_xgb2$Mean_Coverage,
Width = summary_xgb2$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model = "LightGBM",
RMSE = summary_lgb2$Mean_RMSE,
MAE = summary_lgb2$Mean_MAE,
ME = summary_lgb2$Mean_ME,
MPE = summary_lgb2$Mean_MPE,
MAPE = summary_lgb2$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage = summary_lgb2$Mean_Coverage,
Width = summary_lgb2$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model = "GLMNET",
RMSE = summary_glmnet2$Mean_RMSE,
MAE = summary_glmnet2$Mean_MAE,
ME = summary_glmnet2$Mean_ME,
MPE = summary_glmnet2$Mean_MPE,
MAPE = summary_glmnet2$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage = summary_glmnet2$Mean_Coverage,
Width = summary_glmnet2$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model = "Neural Network",
RMSE = summary_nn2$Mean_RMSE,
MAE = summary_nn2$Mean_MAE,
ME = summary_nn2$Mean_ME,
MPE = summary_nn2$Mean_MPE,
MAPE = summary_nn2$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage = summary_nn2$Mean_Coverage,
Width = summary_nn2$Mean_Width
)

)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

compare_80$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$RMSE)

compare_80$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$MAE)

compare_80$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_80$ME))

compare_80$MPE_Rank <- rank(
abs(compare_80$MPE),
na.last = "keep"
)

compare_80$MAPE_Rank <- rank(
compare_80$MAPE,
na.last = "keep"
)

compare_80$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
-compare_80$Coverage
)

compare_80$Width_Rank <- rank(
compare_80$Width
)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_80$Overall_Rank <- rowSums(

compare_80[,c(

"RMSE_Rank",

"MAE_Rank",

"ME_Rank",

"MPE_Rank",

"MAPE_Rank",

"Coverage_Rank",

"Width_Rank"

)],

na.rm = TRUE
)

compare_80 <- compare_80[
order(compare_80$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_80) <- NULL

compare_80
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#====================================================
# ROUND VALUES
#====================================================

compare_80_export <- compare_80

compare_80_export$RMSE <- round(compare_80_export$RMSE,4)
compare_80_export$MAE <- round(compare_80_export$MAE,4)
compare_80_export$ME <- round(compare_80_export$ME,4)
compare_80_export$MPE <- round(compare_80_export$MPE,4)
compare_80_export$MAPE <- round(compare_80_export$MAPE,4)
compare_80_export$Coverage <- round(compare_80_export$Coverage,4)
compare_80_export$Width <- round(compare_80_export$Width,4)

#====================================================
# LATEX TABLE
#====================================================

latex_compare_80 <- kable(

  compare_80_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption = "Comparison of Statistical and Machine Learning Models for the Linnet Dataset under the 80:20 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:linnet80_compare"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 7
)

#====================================================
# EXPORT
#====================================================

writeLines(

  as.character(
    latex_compare_80
  ),

  "compare_80_ml_linnet.tex"
)

cat(
"\nTable exported successfully:\n",
"compare_80_ml_linnet.tex\n"
)
```

#90
```{r}
#====================================================
# MODEL COMPARISON TABLE
# 90:10 SPLIT
#====================================================

compare_90 <- rbind(

data.frame(
Model="Random Forest",
RMSE=summary_rf3$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_rf3$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_rf3$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_rf3$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_rf3$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_rf3$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_rf3$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="XGBoost",
RMSE=summary_xgb3$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_xgb3$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_xgb3$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_xgb3$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_xgb3$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_xgb3$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_xgb3$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="LightGBM",
RMSE=summary_lgb3$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_lgb3$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_lgb3$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_lgb3$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_lgb3$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_lgb3$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_lgb3$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="GLMNET",
RMSE=summary_glmnet3$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_glmnet3$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_glmnet3$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_glmnet3$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_glmnet3$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_glmnet3$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_glmnet3$Mean_Width
),

data.frame(
Model="Neural Network",
RMSE=summary_nn3$Mean_RMSE,
MAE=summary_nn3$Mean_MAE,
ME=summary_nn3$Mean_ME,
MPE=summary_nn3$Mean_MPE,
MAPE=summary_nn3$Mean_MAPE,
Coverage=summary_nn3$Mean_Coverage,
Width=summary_nn3$Mean_Width
)

)

#====================================================
# RANKS
#====================================================

compare_90$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_90$RMSE)

compare_90$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_90$MAE)

compare_90$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_90$ME))

compare_90$MPE_Rank <- rank(
abs(compare_90$MPE),
na.last = "keep"
)

compare_90$MAPE_Rank <- rank(
compare_90$MAPE,
na.last = "keep"
)

compare_90$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
-compare_90$Coverage
)

compare_90$Width_Rank <- rank(
compare_90$Width
)

#====================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#====================================================

compare_90$Overall_Rank <- rowSums(

compare_90[,c(

"RMSE_Rank",
"MAE_Rank",
"ME_Rank",
"MPE_Rank",
"MAPE_Rank",
"Coverage_Rank",
"Width_Rank"

)],

na.rm = TRUE
)

compare_90 <- compare_90[
order(compare_90$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_90) <- NULL

compare_90

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#====================================================
# ROUND VALUES
#====================================================

compare_90_export <- compare_90

compare_90_export$RMSE <- round(compare_90_export$RMSE,4)
compare_90_export$MAE <- round(compare_90_export$MAE,4)
compare_90_export$ME <- round(compare_90_export$ME,4)
compare_90_export$MPE <- round(compare_90_export$MPE,4)
compare_90_export$MAPE <- round(compare_90_export$MAPE,4)
compare_90_export$Coverage <- round(compare_90_export$Coverage,4)
compare_90_export$Width <- round(compare_90_export$Width,4)

#====================================================
# LATEX TABLE
#====================================================

latex_compare_90 <- kable(

  compare_90_export,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption = "Comparison of Statistical and Machine Learning Models for the Linnet Dataset under the 90:10 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:linnet90_compare"

) %>%

kable_styling(

  latex_options = c(
    "hold_position",
    "scale_down"
  ),

  font_size = 7
)

#====================================================
# EXPORT
#====================================================

writeLines(

  as.character(
    latex_compare_90
  ),

  "compare_90_ml_linnet.tex"
)

cat(
"\nTable exported successfully:\n",
"compare_90_ml_linnet.tex\n"
)
```
